name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: The right to choose in America should have marked 50 years today…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654664/388667395/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230122ROE_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDdhYWNmOS1iMDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rW58XafznR0QIzZIyWTe-vrLlnLpf_JnbwyDxusPr4A=)
---
Today is the 50th anniversary of the _Roe v. Wade _decision.

But instead of being able to celebrate this landmark ruling that federally recognized the right to choose, we're now in the aftermath of _Roe_ being overturned.

Over the last seven months, _millions_ of Americans in nearly half the states have lost the right to reproductive choice — the result of a decades-long project by Republicans to stack the courts with extremist judges who ignore precedent and widely-recognized freedoms.

**Today, I am thinking of everyone who has been forced into an impossible situation by restrictive and regressive state laws, and I am more determined than ever to stay in the fight to restore the rights that Roe granted us for nearly five decades.**

[**Securing abortion rights nationwide starts with taking back the House, and we can't do that if Republicans gain ground in my swing district. When I was in the Virginia State Senate, I stood against Republican laws that placed undue restrictions on the right to choose. I championed bills to remove unnecessary waiting periods and repeal TRAP laws targeted at women’s health clinics.

In Congress, I've repeatedly voted to federally protect the right to choose – something any Republican replacement would _never_ do. I'll continue to champion reproductive freedom as long as I'm in Congress, and I won't let the far right intimidate me.

**I'm working hard to help secure a strong pro-choice majority in Congress, but I can't do it without you. Your grassroots support today will help us secure VA-10 early, and aid Democratic incumbents and challengers in swing districts across the country.**

[**Please, chip in a few dollars or more now to help us show that support for the right to choose has never been higher and that we will keep mobilizing and organizing in the face of injustice.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654672/388667405/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230122ROE_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDdhYWNmOS1iMDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rW58XafznR0QIzZIyWTe-vrLlnLpf_JnbwyDxusPr4A=)

Thank you,

Jennifer

clean_body: = Today is the 50th anniversary of the Roe v. Wade decision. But instead of being able to celebrate this landmark ruling that federally recognized the right to choose, we're now in the aftermath of Roe being overturned. Over the last seven months, millions of Americans in nearly half the states have lost the right to reproductive choice — the result of a decades-long project by Republicans to stack the courts with extremist judges who ignore precedent and widely-recognized freedoms. Today, I am thinking of everyone who has been forced into an impossible situation by restrictive and regressive state laws, and I am more determined than ever to stay in the fight to restore the rights that Roe granted us for nearly five decades. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = When I was in the Virginia State Senate, I stood against Republican laws that placed undue restrictions on the right to choose. I championed bills to remove unnecessary waiting periods and repeal TRAP laws targeted at women’s health clinics. In Congress, I've repeatedly voted to federally protect the right to choose – something any Republican replacement would never do. I'll continue to champion reproductive freedom as long as I'm in Congress, and I won't let the far right intimidate me. I'm working hard to help secure a strong pro-choice majority in Congress, but I can't do it without you. Your grassroots support today will help us secure VA-10 early, and aid Democratic incumbents and challengers in swing districts across the country. = Thank you, Jennifer Rep. body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654732/388669612/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFiZWE4YS1iMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VDDP9C4yPgWPt1LGCo3Dj7YM8P8N8v-ad4uqLnkORfQ=&emci=1dcefff6-ad9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=fd1bea8a-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579)

| | Peter, I was born in a world before _Roe v. Wade_ , but I spent (almost) the entirety of my adult life knowing my constitutional, _fundamental_ , right to decide whether and when to have children was guaranteed. **And so, today's anniversary of the**** _Roe_****decision serves as an urgent reminder that the fight for access to reproductive health care and abortion rights is far from over.** Last year, when the Supreme Court overturned _Roe_ , folks in our movement took to the streets in unprecedented numbers. We sent the Supreme Court Justices and their supporters a clear message: _we're taking our rights back_. We made abortion rights _the_ defining issue of campaigns everywhere, and anti-choice extremists lost competitive seats across the country. [**Chip in $3 now to help me make sure I can hold this seat in order to continue to fight for reproductive freedom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654733/388669640/-1599294071?refcode=2023-01-22-roe&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=fd1bea8a-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFiZWE4YS1iMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VDDP9C4yPgWPt1LGCo3Dj7YM8P8N8v-ad4uqLnkORfQ=) With a narrow majority in the House, one of Kevin McCarthy's first orders of business was to ignore the 3⁄4 of Americans who believe abortion should be a personal decision between a patient and their health care provider. After vowing to respect states rights on abortion access, they quickly rammed through not one, but _two_ radical restrictions on abortions. For decades, anti-choice extremists mounted a relentless assault on abortion rights and access to reproductive health care. They cheated their way onto the Supreme Court, and gerrymandered Congress to guarantee that anti-choice Republicans control Congress. **But they aren't unstoppable, Peter.** Despite their best efforts, anti-choice Republicans only captured a narrow majority in the House. **And because of your support, I was able to become the first woman and mother to represent the 4th Congressional District.** Voters in the 4th Congressional District saw through my MAGA Republican opponent's lies about being willing to "protect women's health care". He would have voted with Kevin McCarthy and you can be sure that the GOP is already recruiting someone to run against me and back McCarthy's extreme agenda in 2024. **Without control over when or if you get pregnant, a woman cannot control her economic future and if that's not a freedom worth fighting for, I don't know what is.** [**And when we fight, we win. Chip in $3 now and help me stay in the fight for abortion rights. For as long as it takes.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57654734/388669641/-1599294071?refcode=2023-01-22-roe&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=fd1bea8a-b19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFiZWE4YS1iMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VDDP9C4yPgWPt1LGCo3Dj7YM8P8N8v-ad4uqLnkORfQ=) clean_body: | | | | Peter, I was born in a world before Roe v. Wade , but I spent (almost) the entirety of my adult life knowing my constitutional, fundamental , right to decide whether and when to have children was guaranteed. And so, today's anniversary of the Roedecision serves as an urgent reminder that the fight for access to reproductive health care and abortion rights is far from over. Last year, when the Supreme Court overturned Roe , folks in our movement took to the streets in unprecedented numbers. We sent the Supreme Court Justices and their supporters a clear message: we're taking our rights back. We made abortion rights the defining issue of campaigns everywhere, and anti-choice extremists lost competitive seats across the country. = With a narrow majority in the House, one of Kevin McCarthy's first orders of business was to ignore the 3⁄4 of Americans who believe abortion should be a personal decision between a patient and their health care provider. After vowing to respect states rights on abortion access, they quickly rammed through not one, but two radical restrictions on abortions. For decades, anti-choice extremists mounted a relentless assault on abortion rights and access to reproductive health care. They cheated their way onto the Supreme Court, and gerrymandered Congress to guarantee that anti-choice Republicans control Congress. But they aren't unstoppable, Peter. Despite their best efforts, anti-choice Republicans only captured a narrow majority in the House. And because of your support, I was able to become the first woman and mother to represent the 4th Congressional District. Voters in the 4th Congressional District saw through my MAGA Republican opponent's lies about being willing to "protect women's health care". He would have voted with Kevin McCarthy and you can be sure that the GOP is already recruiting someone to run against me and back McCarthy's extreme agenda in 2024. Without control over when or if you get pregnant, a woman cannot control her economic future and if that's not a freedom worth fighting for, I don't know what is. = All the best Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Team Lizzie
subject: Lizzie’s note on Roe
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
We want to make sure you saw Lizzie’s note about the 50th anniversary of the Roe v. Wade decision.
For decades, Roe set out a framework to ensure Americans’ right to make their own personal decisions about whether and when to have children. For years, anti-abortion activists have worked every way they can to dismantle this framework – from the legislatures to the courts to the streets. In the last year, we have seen that work result in the overturning of Roe .
Lizzie is fighting in Congress to restore Roe and to ensure access to reproductive health care and reproductive justice in Texas and across the country. And she’s counting on you to be one of the voices in this fight. Will you add your name to our list to show your support for reproductive rights? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/3WEDzO4Yb0iVuB6RSdsYEQ2]
Thanks,
Team Lizzie
----------Original Message----------
DATE: Jan 21, 2022
SENDER: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
The fiftieth anniversary of Roe v. Wade has all of us thinking about where we are today, and how we got here. And in this first year after the disastrous Dobbs decision, we know that we have work to do. Where do we go from here?
Well, that question has me thinking again about Texas women. Women in Texas—and in states across the country—are facing a full assault on our health, privacy, dignity, and freedom. Here in Texas the cruel SB8 law and the trigger law following Dobbs have created confusion, chaos, and fear. But they have also galvanized people in Texas and across the country. And we are fighting back.
I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again and again and again. We have to remember that, while Texas gave us #SB8, it also gave us Roe v. Wade in the first place.
Texas gave us Sarah Weddington, who in her mid-20s filed Roe v. Wade with a group of Texas women challenging the system, and won it in the Supreme Court.
Texas gave us Barbara Jordan, who spoke the truth in the halls of power in Austin and in Washington, and restored Americans’ faith in the Constitution with her own.
Texas gave us Ann Richards, who opened government to everyone, who when asked what she would have done differently had she known how long her tenure would be said she would have “raised more hell.”
And Texas has given us so many more fearless, fabulous women. We don’t have to look only to our history. Texas has amazing leaders working today in every possible way to restore our rights—leading national reproductive rights and justice organizations, fighting in our legislature, and organizing our next generation to lead on these issues.
So, on this anniversary, we take from these Texas women a guide of what we must do now:
challenge the system,
speak the truth,
raise more hell,
and win elections .
That’s what we are working to do every single day on #TeamLizzie. Your support and commitment are vital to our effort. Thank you. We have a lot of work to do.
But I know that, together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Sign-off [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf-footer]
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC.

| [ ](http://links.thehousegop.org/u/click?_t=4124e29358a3405582c65b1d6d5dccb5&_m=05c4969699eb44d79955ae0a2a9d8ca1&_e=NBUitOiXcnyrg9PKU86GcmdK_e0zmY9vuTxD73S6DV39YeIYR3s9_CCGl-h_W8CSIKEGU4N3Eh2Qvc633Sr6pTKmoYW8d7pMq69M9sS-V6xcgB0Cvh9H72ISGaYAH4vQ6hg28W0WjObL_CNtfJMtQRyPUsxaaN9CkbAf0RHVwnX5hElh_s3RfWgFIb2cg1rII7k0L_Q4y-HPFtO-kwQFYrVWYPd_5TLqwmdf61WX3Xyr2om1GFCBYqnzcpZYGw-zfhzVN03bWUMmfakXuB03iqzvEA9qYNJHNd03IxY9ZjGqHY6ASvlj2L5UJjgoGPW-6ITiMWO8jqGybieHGLfvxArfiBqy9fw75LkAq6A_th_RX2-DK8FlN62PVM-L89EBVVVJhrWckSCppnApfBQkM4uyqbQGHqVaT-C0YaAUurqgs6Hb4lQQDLXyavx-ADoXk3t6tYLXIlb_D7ESDB4qewGWM57WXytvaqymffRcw7_7pfFsHKUcZjtqo7_cDN0p174Hi6vhEuq1Twzr2lYBOFmBWMfJzTgH5p-XGIzgXO8%3D)
---
Dear friend,

**_I am very excited to announce that I will be running for the U.S. Senate in 2024 to represent the great State of Indiana._** In the Senate, I intend to protect your freedom, defend our conservative values, and put America first. As we begin this journey together, I want to share my story:

I grew up in a working-class household in Columbia City, Indiana. My father was a factory worker and my mother worked in a nursing home. We often lived paycheck to paycheck, and I was raised in a trailer park for many years.

[](http://links.thehousegop.org/u/click?_t=4124e29358a3405582c65b1d6d5dccb5&_m=05c4969699eb44d79955ae0a2a9d8ca1&_e=NBUitOiXcnyrg9PKU86GcmdK_e0zmY9vuTxD73S6DV39YeIYR3s9_CCGl-h_W8CSIKEGU4N3Eh2Qvc633Sr6pTKmoYW8d7pMq69M9sS-V6xcgB0Cvh9H72ISGaYAH4vQ6hg28W0WjObL_CNtfJMtQRyPUsxaaN9CkbAf0RHVwnX5hElh_s3RfWgFIb2cg1rII7k0L_Q4y-HPFtO-kwQFYrVWYPd_5TLqwmdf61WX3Xyr2om1GFCBYqnzcpZYGw-zfhzVN03bWUMmfakXuB03iqzvEA9qYNJHNd03IxY9ZjGqHY6ASvlj2L5UJjgoGPW-6ITiMWO8jqGybieHGLfvxArfiBqy9fw75LkAq6A_th_RX2-DK8FlN62PVM-L89EBVVVJhrWckSCppnApfBQkM9o5mqUlEjpWoGQF3hgOAtSySKKarTSYgamdfExDyhJDxBQRZSThX2RDXndfYoB1rehyOD6jRa0cgKJhynW7j9ijX53SJMFUpuJvrFlb80YIfGRySOmx-N3BF0Wvt_2ghfBxuIjBtw6mdKQj9sqnKQo%3D)
Growing up, my parents taught me the values of hard-work, personal responsibility, and service to our community. My father voted for Democrats much of his life, but now, like many Americans, recognizes that the Republican Party is the true party of the working class.

I was the first in my family to attend college. At Indiana University, I met my wonderful wife, Amanda, who has been the biggest blessing in my life. She keeps me grounded and ensures our family stays true to our conservative values every day.

Coming from a humble background, I felt a calling to give back to my community. As such, after serving on a county council, I became a member of the Indiana State Senate in 2010. During my time in office, I took a leave of absence while I was deployed to Afghanistan as a Navy Reserve Supply Corps Officer.

[](http://links.thehousegop.org/u/click?_t=4124e29358a3405582c65b1d6d5dccb5&_m=05c4969699eb44d79955ae0a2a9d8ca1&_e=NBUitOiXcnyrg9PKU86GcmdK_e0zmY9vuTxD73S6DV39YeIYR3s9_CCGl-h_W8CSIKEGU4N3Eh2Qvc633Sr6pTKmoYW8d7pMq69M9sS-V6xcgB0Cvh9H72ISGaYAH4vQ6hg28W0WjObL_CNtfJMtQRyPUsxaaN9CkbAf0RHVwnX5hElh_s3RfWgFIb2cg1rII7k0L_Q4y-HPFtO-kwQFYrVWYPd_5TLqwmdf61WX3Xyr2om1GFCBYqnzcpZYGw-zfhzVN03bWUMmfakXuB03iqzvEA9qYNJHNd03IxY9ZjGqHY6ASvlj2L5UJjgoGPW-6ITiMWO8jqGybieHGLfvxArfiBqy9fw75LkAq6A_th_RX2-DK8FlN62PVM-L89EBVVVJhrWckSCppnApfBQkM2kMJ2HNHHAeuP7cWpFzeTIhA2vk6zdfVJeVpHSeOUfr0oul6vbtYQgmLB1fqV_6l62RpJd3BOrbSjxofi1SgcZzB1mVScmEC2bdzhSmw4tmpfEaTybUk7vx1sTZ4gKeNG1DokBqCMR8X3X56lyztLM%3D)
Serving my country abroad reinforced my resolve to defend the freedoms and values that make America great. As an Afghanistan War veteran, I know what it means to fight for our country and our values.

[](http://links.thehousegop.org/u/click?_t=4124e29358a3405582c65b1d6d5dccb5&_m=05c4969699eb44d79955ae0a2a9d8ca1&_e=NBUitOiXcnyrg9PKU86GcmdK_e0zmY9vuTxD73S6DV39YeIYR3s9_CCGl-h_W8CSIKEGU4N3Eh2Qvc633Sr6pTKmoYW8d7pMq69M9sS-V6xcgB0Cvh9H72ISGaYAH4vQ6hg28W0WjObL_CNtfJMtQRyPUsxaaN9CkbAf0RHVwnX5hElh_s3RfWgFIb2cg1rII7k0L_Q4y-HPFtO-kwQFYrVWYPd_5TLqwmdf61WX3Xyr2om1GFCBYqnzcpZYGw-zfhzVN03bWUMmfakXuB03iqzvEA9qYNJHNd03IxY9ZjGqHY6ASvlj2L5UJjgoGPW-6ITiMWO8jqGybieHGLfvxArfiBqy9fw75LkAq6A_th_RX2-DK8FlN62PVM-L89EBVVVJhrWckSCppnApfBQkM7K4P0UbBhyICfQizWtaxvUlAop934bn3KgiUGReSai1F2gqtmxcbjTSqg8KJlp7ayNbHyc33xPtCEJGEJGElXBmeszReLfp7qJeDEEhIZA90DcjAc__TxSWnl4emED2L3ll2fIbVDdJfBlF191OoVA%3D)
During my time in Afghanistan, my wife stepped up to fill in for me in the State Senate. I am blessed to have a family dedicated to serving the American people.

Amanda and I started a family back in 2009. We've been blessed with three beautiful daughters, Lillian, Elizabeth, and Joann, who inspire me each day. I am fighting for our country because I am fighting for their future. I want my daughters to grow up in a country where they are safe and can thrive.

[](http://links.thehousegop.org/u/click?_t=4124e29358a3405582c65b1d6d5dccb5&_m=05c4969699eb44d79955ae0a2a9d8ca1&_e=NBUitOiXcnyrg9PKU86GcmdK_e0zmY9vuTxD73S6DV39YeIYR3s9_CCGl-h_W8CSIKEGU4N3Eh2Qvc633Sr6pTKmoYW8d7pMq69M9sS-V6xcgB0Cvh9H72ISGaYAH4vQ6hg28W0WjObL_CNtfJMtQRyPUsxaaN9CkbAf0RHVwnX5hElh_s3RfWgFIb2cg1rII7k0L_Q4y-HPFtO-kwQFYrVWYPd_5TLqwmdf61WX3Xyr2om1GFCBYqnzcpZYGw-zfhzVN03bWUMmfakXuB03iqzvEA9qYNJHNd03IxY9ZjGqHY6ASvlj2L5UJjgoGPW-6ITiMWO8jqGybieHGLfvxArfiBqy9fw75LkAq6A_th_RX2-DK8FlN62PVM-L89EBVVVJhrWckSCppnApfBQkM07d6LgMNagJ-mJDHEXeAA880bBFSeEptSQiqMaXENxHBzqoerfyqdZVa5uRS57pXd61Pybnanyb8bY3SaKWC6wjnPnc37U1gI9KWDrJCy9v62mx0fB7Sru4-mzxq8r4wm-KziKSN3aTInFN6UEPRs8%3D)
Since 2016, I have chosen to continue my service career by representing Indiana's 3rd district in the U.S. Congress. During my time in the House, I have been a consistent conservative voice dedicated to upholding and protecting the conservative American values that make our nation great. I was elected chair of the Republican Study Committee, the largest caucus of conservatives in the House of Representatives, and have collaborated with strong leaders, like President Trump, to put America first.

[](http://links.thehousegop.org/u/click?_t=4124e29358a3405582c65b1d6d5dccb5&_m=05c4969699eb44d79955ae0a2a9d8ca1&_e=NBUitOiXcnyrg9PKU86GcmdK_e0zmY9vuTxD73S6DV39YeIYR3s9_CCGl-h_W8CSIKEGU4N3Eh2Qvc633Sr6pTKmoYW8d7pMq69M9sS-V6xcgB0Cvh9H72ISGaYAH4vQ6hg28W0WjObL_CNtfJMtQRyPUsxaaN9CkbAf0RHVwnX5hElh_s3RfWgFIb2cg1rII7k0L_Q4y-HPFtO-kwQFYrVWYPd_5TLqwmdf61WX3Xyr2om1GFCBYqnzcpZYGw-zfhzVN03bWUMmfakXuB03iqzvEA9qYNJHNd03IxY9ZjGqHY6ASvlj2L5UJjgoGPW-6ITiMWO8jqGybieHGLfvxArfiBqy9fw75LkAq6A_th_RX2-DK8FlN62PVM-L89EBVVVJhrWckSCppnApfBQkM80KmjUfVP9xAWlJiNIuMGTe5vqMZHUcMpt7Ku9qdFg1pn-Q3USK1pvy0G1uW8hEAGzpE-z61qLZiwqNLrA0oTSzs4kMB-AEjx1dsylfxJsaObsn4uxSIElCbquE4av42GfX035KI727sKCD_aHeWv4%3D)
As the next Senator of Indiana, I intend to continue defending hard-working Americans and refuse to let the radical Left crush our values and destroy our country. My congressional record of fighting for strong families, limited government, and tighter spending speaks for itself. We have a great country worth defending, and I intend to do just that.

As your next Senator, I will fight to balance the federal budget, protect our Southern border, stand up to China, and defend our children against the Left's woke ideology. **But, I need support from strong, grassroots conservatives like YOU to ensure our movement makes it all the way to Washington.** [**_Will you join us in preserving the American Dream?_**](http://links.thehousegop.org/u/click?_t=4124e29358a3405582c65b1d6d5dccb5&_m=05c4969699eb44d79955ae0a2a9d8ca1&_e=NBUitOiXcnyrg9PKU86GcmdK_e0zmY9vuTxD73S6DV39YeIYR3s9_CCGl-h_W8CSIKEGU4N3Eh2Qvc633Sr6pTKmoYW8d7pMq69M9sS-V6xcgB0Cvh9H72ISGaYAH4vQ6hg28W0WjObL_CNtfJMtQRyPUsxaaN9CkbAf0RHVwnX5hElh_s3RfWgFIb2cg1rII7k0L_Q4y-HPFtO-kwQFYrVWYPd_5TLqwmdf61WX3Xyr2om1GFCBYqnzcpZYGw-zfhzVN03bWUMmfakXuB03iqzvEA9qYNJHNd03IxY9ZjGqHY6ASvlj2L5UJjgoGPW-6ITiMWO8jqGybieHGLfvxArfiBqy9fw75LkAq6A_th_RX2-DK8FlN62PVM-L89EBVVVJhrWckSCppnApfBQkM9rCrbIIhwqZKv6kZYQHaQq7vi4WtNdeM0165kKbTOgCJasN2I2YuK2A-3m3dEg0PitJA_aeTDgQqRrG0mMF8Eu9UpdU9_s4ZoZzsL_iBxzyhsIf4M6lpvzkhtuGEE9rUHNEItgRPx8leTvbv010jAg%3D)

name: The Golden Eagle Award (via NRSC)
subject: You’ve won the Golden Eagle Award
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Accept your award and claim your 1000%-MATCH NOW

ICYMI: Vargas on Newsmax this Weekend

Illinois Review Editor-in-Chief and Newsmax columnist Mark Vargas joined Wendy Bell on Newsmax this weekend to talk about what the IL GOP won't discuss - the importance of school board races and electing conservative grassroot Republican candidates.

Vargas also shared his perspective on the Classified document investigation and how liberal networks like CNN are turning on President Biden.

Here's a couple of the highlights!

In 2022, the television doctor’s campaign for Senate, backed by far-right extremists, raised millions of dollars losing to John Fetterman by just a slim margin. Dr. Oz doesn’t care about the people of NJ-05, he cares about power and pleasing his far-right supporters. Josh is in Congress because he cares about bipartisanship, protecting Jersey Values, and fighting for the people of NJ-05. = | = 2024 is much closer than it seems, and with rumors circulating about Dr. Oz’s potential bid, it is crucial we start building Josh’s campaign now. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for helping us continue this fight, Team Gottheimer | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. name: Adam Schiff
subject: No choice but to fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Senate Democrats had a responsibility to the American people to abolish the filibuster and protect abortion rights when Democrats had the House majority.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1612%2E5257348%2EXn7wsv)
Derek, today was supposed to be a celebration of women’s reproductive freedom. One 50 years in the making.
Instead, Republicans executed their decades-long plan to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ last year, with the help of a right-wing Supreme Court stacked with Trump nominees.
**Senate Democrats had a responsibility to the American people to abolish the filibuster and protect abortion rights when Democrats had the House majority.** Two of them refused _(and this week at Davos, you might have even seen them high-fiving about it)._
The filibuster remains intact. Legislation to codify _Roe v. Wade_ and expand the Supreme Court has stalled. Kevin McCarthy and the Republicans are passing extreme anti-choice legislation in the House.
**[Derek, if you agree that protecting reproductive freedom is more important than the filibuster, an archaic Senate rule that appears nowhere within the Constitution, chip in $10 to our campaign to help me keep up the fight.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em.lYGpWb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1612%2E5257348%2EXn7wsv)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em.6K9j-B&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1612%2E5257348%2EXn7wsv)

| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Cm-_r3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1612%2E5257348%2EXn7wsv)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em.cg_Pq_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1612%2E5257348%2EXn7wsv)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jan2023_abs_em.tb8BsE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=9&akid=1612%2E5257348%2EXn7wsv)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Bvk6kQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=10&akid=1612%2E5257348%2EXn7wsv)
---
When the Supreme Court decided _Roe v. Wade_ in 1973 — in a decisive 7-2 majority opinion — it ended restrictions on basic reproductive health care and permitted women to obtain abortions legally.
Now, the Republican Party has engineered a right-wing judiciary and Supreme Court after decades of careful planning, and last year one of their state bans in Mississippi — argued in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ — accomplished what anti-choice extremists had so long hoped. The reversal of _Roe_ and more than a dozen trigger bans in conservative states across the country.
Your ability to safely access reproductive health care or obtain an abortion shouldn’t depend on which state you live in. We need Congress to take action.
**[Add a $10 contribution to our campaign to help me continue the fight against GOP extremists attacking the constitutional right to reproductive freedom.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em.lYGpWb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230122_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=11&akid=1612%2E5257348%2EXn7wsv)**
We will never go back to the days before _Roe_. Never. Thanks for standing with me.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1612%2E5257348%2EXn7wsv) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1612%2E5257348%2EXn7wsv)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS

| | Peter,

Today is the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_. And this anniversary is very different from the 49 prior ones. Previously, Supreme Court precedent stood as a bulwark for reproductive freedom. Now, Roe has been overruled.

I am committed to fighting to restore access to safe and legal abortion in Wisconsin. And the fight in court to block enforcement of Wisconsin’s criminal abortion ban is ongoing.

The Republican-led state legislature could vote to repeal that ban. The legislature _should_ vote to repeal that ban. But it’s clear that’s not going to happen with our current state legislature.

**_[Peter, if you oppose Wisconsin’s 19th-century criminal abortion ban, please add your name!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57655613/388697296/776078157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mjk3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODBmY2ZhMC1jMDlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WBUpvQrJ2lXDZt9UFiW8WLRNIB1z0AYOTlAcO8ye3lk=&emci=5d26db40-be9a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=980fcfa0-c09a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=349307)_**

Thank you,

Josh

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Today marks 50 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
on a day that would normally be spent celebrating
#
Peter,
Today marks 50 years since the Supreme Court’s landmark decision in _Roe v. Wade_. But on a day that would normally be spent celebrating a monumental win in the fight for reproductive rights, this year is different.
Since the _Dobbs_ decision overturning _Roe_ last summer, we have already seen more than a dozen states completely ban abortions or make them nearly unobtainable. In other states across the country, Republicans are continuing to attempt to limit access to abortion and other reproductive care.
This is unacceptable, and I will keep working toward federal legislation ensuring the right to the full range of reproductive care. **[Add your name to my petition now to join me in the fight to protect abortion rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57655614/388697326/-1430134513?refcode=dd_em_230122_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230122_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzU2OGIyZi1jMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e7AdKQSXCOu3PggScpRwLLeFucOXixxixOAeCGUOHcE=&emci=cec851b7-a49a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=43568b2f-c19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
Today, we are reminded that it is more important than ever to protect reproductive freedom and codify the rights guaranteed by _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law.
On _Roe v. Wade_ ’s 50th anniversary, we’re counting on our grassroots supporters like you to make your voice heard and help us protect access to reproductive health care.
**[Sign my petition if you agree: We must codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and restore and protect the full range of reproductive health care, including abortion >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57655615/388697327/-1430134513?refcode=dd_em_230122_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230122_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzU2OGIyZi1jMTlhLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e7AdKQSXCOu3PggScpRwLLeFucOXixxixOAeCGUOHcE=&emci=cec851b7-a49a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=43568b2f-c19a-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

| Friend,
As a dedicated conservative, I’ve always remained committed to putting the best interests of the American people first.
And that’s why I’m leading the fight to hold bureaucrats accountable and demand moderates and Democrats do too.
We’ve made our demands clear and have already accomplished so much because of your support...but now we need to ramp up our efforts.
**So I’m taking on the IRS, calling for lower taxes for all Americans, and fighting to preserve innocent life.**
I’m working as hard as I can, **[but I need your help to make sure Congress hears our message and gets these things done.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUU1v3CAQ_TX4ZsvGXuM9-JBklUZVe-ghaW-IhTGLCtgBnK3_fQfLaqVIgIb35uPNDIxNz7quowM7F2rsqGgmWZiR1rStG7z0dDrRSg01m85iUPV5kJIB6WpwwthqCgDpZvxvCAr_WyVnV9zGCSY59M0gW1C9aLHC0DPGhFBXqVTPCjveUloiaR8IfcYTQa4BqrvxAVROgpjwarsarWO2r1zNns-OT0lxqWMpZx_5NfBDKSXts3Dz6hNpL21NaB9yymC8RiCFFRBak-MOlFkdYnsDBxjnNUhA0EvLhVusmbaDkvgVRnsk90J1uWvKckQyWZPd3GJkziv453lwlKkDxJiNCOEDYz4Adc_oITT8l39Um32CvQdUUp7lfeh-vaSvA9LcW6OQ-ATejMIxXv4071Lb7WcRRrXcjbUm9gzXpPc15a0cbY2EPRJK97A8NVwAXVP7Jl5fv4et_CZ-lF9Ob1Rnkj7hm7YF_nkeSapjeJSwy19ttL3D)** | | | | [DEMAND ACTION](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUU1v3CAQ_TX4ZgvjD3YPPrTdbqS0PfSQ9IhYGLMoBjuAk7q_voNltVIkQPDe8ObNDAx1z9u2ZSd-LvTQMlmPqrADo6yhNW7WdR2r9Iny8SxPmp5PSnEgLQUn7VSNASDdrX-BoPG9VWp2xX1o5a1HCUV5x2vZdZTKXlPdYCLoWN0W03BPaYmk-UTYFVcEtQao3q0PoLMIYtLr7WaNifl-E3r2YnZiTFooE0s1-yhuQRxOGWmu0s2rT6S5NJSwPmTJYL1BIIUVEFqTEw60XR1iewEHGOc1KEDQq0lIt0x23A5K4VNa45HcE9Fy95TtyGSzp2lzi1VZV4qP_RBo0wSIMV8ihDf88wboe8YIaeC__SPb7BPsNaCT8vX6-O1PE1-2r0gLP1mNxAfwbjW28fK7flVm2n4VYdDLu50mG3uOYzL7mPJUjrIGwj8TxvZvuWs4ALam5lk-Pf0IW_ld_iwfumdmMsm-4Jm2Bf5FHiLV0TxG-OUvLku9PQ)

**The IRS is a bloated bureaucracy that wastes billions of dollars every year while stifling economic growth and violating the privacy of American citizens.**

We need to put an end to this and give hard working Americans the freedom to keep more of their own money.

At the same time, we must also work to protect the lives of the unborn. Every human life is precious and should be protected under law.

**We cannot stand idly by while Democrats make it easier to take innocent lives.**

That's why I am asking for your support. With your donation, we can fight to defund the IRS, lower our income taxes, and defend the rights of the unborn with our new Republican Majority.

OFFICIAL REPUBLICAN POLL: Should illegal immigrants be allowed to vote in our elections?
|
---
| | | **OFFICIAL REPUBLICAN POLL:**
Should illegal immigrants be allowed to vote in our elections?
---
**[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62235306:Jt8-1dGNH:m:1:3331421248:BA8F8322C547672AE145E945647C872C:r)[**YES >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62235306:Jt8-1dGNH:m:1:3331421248:BA8F8322C547672AE145E945647C872C:r)_[**NO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62235306:Jt8-1dGNH:m:1:3331421248:BA8F8322C547672AE145E945647C872C:r)**
---
Peter - we'll keep this email short and to the point:

Liberal cities in New York and California are moving ahead with plans to allow non-citizens to vote in local elections. Based on what we're hearing, many Conservatives have strong opinions about this issue.

**House Republican leaders are deeply concerned about this controversial policy. They want to know where you stand. **

Majority Leader Steve Scalise is taking the lead to collect responses from a few of our top supporters. He just launched this quick survey and he's hoping you'll take a minute to answer it. Should illegal immigrants be allowed to vote in our elections? _**[Respond now using this secure link.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62235306:Jt8-1dGNH:m:1:3331421248:BA8F8322C547672AE145E945647C872C:r "Respond now using this secure
link.")**_

Thanks in advance for your feedback.

House Republican Survey
From Majority Leader Steve Scalise

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC)
subject: 3 special election battles in Pennsylvania >>
body:
In just two weeks, there will be three special elections in Pennsylvania that could determine the control of the chamber. | | |
---
| | **In just over two weeks, there will be three special elections in Pennsylvania that could _determine_ the control of the chamber this year – so Democrats must hold every single seat. Here’s what we’re up against:**
* In House District 32, this previously Democratic-held seat is being contested by an anti-choice, anti-LGBTQ+ Republican.
* In House Districts 34 and 35, our Democrats won – but also won elections for the US House and Lieutenant Governor. In HD-35, we’re up against an anti-abortion, pro-gun extremist who’s been seen rubbing shoulders with known insurrectionist Doug Mastriano.

Our candidates, Joe McAndrew, Abigail Salisbury, and Matt Gergely MUST win to ensure that these Republican extremists are kept out of office and that Pennsylvania Democrats can get to work fighting for working families. Unfortunately, these special elections are even _more_ expensive than anticipated because they could determine continued control of this critical chamber – Republicans are pouring money into these races, and we can't fall behind. clean_body: In just two weeks, there will be three special elections in Pennsylvania that could determine the control of the chamber. | | | | | In just over two weeks, there will be three special elections in Pennsylvania that could determine the control of the chamber this year – so Democrats must hold every single seat. Here’s what we’re up against: In House District 32, this previously Democratic-held seat is being contested by an anti-choice, anti-LGBTQ+ Republican. In House Districts 34 and 35, our Democrats won – but also won elections for the US House and Lieutenant Governor. In HD-35, we’re up against an anti-abortion, pro-gun extremist who’s been seen rubbing shoulders with known insurrectionist Doug Mastriano. Our candidates, Joe McAndrew, Abigail Salisbury, and Matt Gergely MUST win to ensure that these Republican extremists are kept out of office and that Pennsylvania Democrats can get to work fighting for working families. Unfortunately, these special elections are even more expensive than anticipated because they could determine continued control of this critical chamber – Republicans are pouring money into these races, and we can't fall behind. That’s why we’re asking: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Here’s the truth: State Republicans consistently outraised us last cycle, and they're fired up to do everything they can to win these races. And, with the special elections being more costly than ever, we can’t afford to lose momentum now. We’ll be blunt: If Pennsylvania Republicans control the House, there will be dire consequences. So we need every one of our grassroots donors supporting us in these special election fights. Can we count on you? Thanks for all you do – your support has a huge impact in this moment. name: 4Patriots
subject: America's Biggest Threat In 2023
body:
# America's Biggest Threat In 2023
**BREAKING** - A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe. In 2022 alone there have been over 70 attacks on the power grid with reports of six in Florida, five in Oregon and Washington. And according to national security experts, this trend is only going to continue. As America's power grid comes under increasing attack, will your city be the next to fall victim to this growing threat? It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. **National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid.** In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. [**When massive blackouts strike the U.S.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657589%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=coBXOra2GktdE93VQFxOnA&sysid=1) Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: **Our crumbling electric grid.** When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. **"Our death toll would be staggering"** reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? [**What will you do when the power goes out?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657580%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FwpbrDXGn5x2pbe9dGAaKQ&sysid=1) **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without** gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657581%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=deIgU0yykkWEbmdm2%2bwIgA&sysid=1) **It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power.** That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. [**You can see a live demo of it in action here**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657582%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r7oDWg0U3Q36WAO0hPx71g&sysid=1) Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... **[Click here to see it in action!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657583%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dKkgi9ZBZtdcxFLlWuKd6Q&sysid=1)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0400%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=wxJEeQyFHVhNfzr%2fpzriCA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0400%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=wxJEeQyFHVhNfzr%2fpzriCA&sysid=1)

name: Virginia Charitable Bingo Association
subject: Your signature will show Richmond that you support charities
body:
Virginia Charitable Bingo Association

Add your name today

Nonprofits throughout Virginia are
being restricted on the ways in which they are allowed to collect
donations. In Virginia, big-gaming organizations and casinos
operate with less restrictions than nonprofit charitable
organizations.

By signing the petition below, you will be sending a message to
Richmond that charitable organizations should be operating on
equal footing with large for-profit organizations.

SIGN HERE

Your signature will show Richmond
that you support charities throughout the Commonwealth. WIthout
this revenue, nonprofits throughout the Commonwealth will be
restricted from making a positive impact in our communities.

SIGN HERE

Virginia Charitable Bingo Association

It's time for all of us to think carefully about the dollars we hold. I'm not just talking about the money in your checking or savings account - I'm talking about your nest egg and retirement accounts. name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Senator Chase Will Present 2 Bills to Reverse Gun Control Passed in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
It's Time to Reverse Unconstitutional Red Flag Laws & End Localities Ability to Create Gun Free Zones
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016eipoxCAdU3EOwpMuex66uEkA0J5H4bho1mVv3yB5TkXgmivXghg_8jhQ2zI0Fv8MNU2AE-n9jZWJljL1M-LrchaVCILtezl9PDwhoophaUyRrCiIlMbZDg4DPorRIDgktnkBFOjTF_CyEOfIjzSyZqV4wc_ym-xOtGuFMXbPpU=&c=QO_r5KJwCqeWluyXO9I7Ku544D7u6nbP7pQakB_UOi-vbJLnKLfYfQ==&ch=tvnKBXEvILKAe3HL6y1JsFoL-VVmufHGZvzrGsCpZUioFKiZXcTrjg==)
---

| | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 22, 2022

Press Contact:
Jody Pyles
jody@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

It's Time to Reverse the
2020 Virginia Gun Grab

SB1488 Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws
SB805 Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones

Senator Chase will present both SB1488 to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws and SB805 to Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones before the Senate Judiciary Committee . Both bills seek to reverse the Gun Grab that took place in 2020.

CHESTERFIELD, VA. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present both SB1488 to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws and SB805 to Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones before the Senate Judiciary Committee. Both bills seek to reverse the Gun Grab that took place in 2020.

SB1488 is a Chase sponsored bill to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws which fail to recognize that the government should NOT seize weapons from people who haven't been convicted of a crime.

"Even the New York State Supreme Court agrees. Red Flag laws are unconstitutional. They allow the government to take away your guns without any due process. This is unamerican. Red flag laws allow individuals who are not medically trained to deny an individual their basic fundamental right to protect themselves despite the fact that they are not trained medical professionals and the person hasn't committed a crime," stated Senator Amanda Chase.

The State Supreme Court judge in Rochester, New York ruled this past December that Red Flag laws are unconstitutional.

El Paso County's local district attorney Michael Allen said "red flag laws" are not only unconstitutional, "they are a poor excuse to take people's guns and not designed in any way to address real mental health concerns."

SB805 is a Chase sponsored bill to reverse a law that was passed in 2020 by the Democrat controlled General Assembly, which allows a locality to create gun free zones. Gun free zones disarm law abiding citizens who can no longer legally protect themselves. Gun free zones empower criminals and increase gun violence as criminals take advantage of disarmed law abiding citizens. Gun free zones increase the risk of guns being stolen from vehicles when conceal carry holders are forced to disarm to enter an event.

"Over the past nearly two years, we have seen a troubling trend take place with Democrat controlled legislatures and localities across Virginia misuse their authority to override both the U.S. Constitution and the Virginia Constitution which both state "the people have the right of to keep and bear Arms, and that right shall not be infringed."

The U.S. Constitution clearly states, "A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State, the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed."

The Virginia Constitution in Article I of the Bill of Rights in Section 13 states,
"That a well regulated militia, composed of the body of the people, trained to arms, is the proper, natural, and safe defense of a free state, therefore, the right of the people to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed; that standing armies, in time of peace, should be avoided as dangerous to liberty; and that in all cases the military should be under strict subordination to, and governed by, the civil power."

"It's time to honor the U.S. Constitution and strike these unconstitutional laws that are mischievous at best, allowing individuals to take away another individual's rights based on speculation and hearsay," stated Senator Chase.

Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present both SB1488 to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws and SB805 to Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones to the Senate Judiciary Committee, which meets Mondays at 8am in the Pocahontas Building in Senate Room A, and Wednesdays in the Capitol, 30 minutes after session.

The bills will most likely be heard this coming Wednesday or next Monday. Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Judiciary Committee and ask them to please reverse the gun grab of 2020.

Public comments can be made in person or online at:
[https://virginia-senate.granicus.com/ViewPublisher.php?view_id=3](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016eipoxCAdU3EOwpMuex66uEkA0J5H4bho1mVv3yB5TkXgmivXghg_4zIvL4r-gsnANrPigRhmAib9ebwhmrOLcj52vd9C_Vhdqvp9QO1RFdpMx0InCAbz8yec3R0vGIVqIX6i5-OKAVy9jC5SuW_BjSRSiAKbqTnKTLEg_BbAV2q5AvacJNIqmwfwDvgxmR-x0-zoZRpbw8=&c=QO_r5KJwCqeWluyXO9I7Ku544D7u6nbP7pQakB_UOi-vbJLnKLfYfQ==&ch=tvnKBXEvILKAe3HL6y1JsFoL-VVmufHGZvzrGsCpZUioFKiZXcTrjg==)

name: Courier Newsroom via Blue Amp Action
subject: We’re fighting back against disinformation. Here’s how:
body:
Real news, right here.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6dc65104-5e1c-4e9a-8ba8-c56d3d480dcf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Fox News. Breitbart. Tucker Carlson. It seems like right-wing lies, fake news, and misinformation are everywhere. The consequences are dire. Americans have lost trust in democracy and each other. And we’ve seen an alarming increase in political violence. The mainstream media isn’t helping. While local newsrooms disappear and dangerous conspiracy theories take hold, legacy news outlets obsess about profits and the elite news consumers who will pay for their content. You're not alone if you feel like we’re in a full-blown information crisis. At Courier Newsroom we feel the same way – and we’re doing something about. [Will you help us fight back against right-wing propaganda and lies by signing up for Courier Newsroom today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f298be8-7756-4185-a4a8-f5a3dd80fda4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

As the nation's largest left-leaning local news network, we run newsrooms in eight key battleground states (and counting) where disinformation is spreading the fastest. Every day, our talented journalists deliver factual news stories to readers who live in areas where honest, local news is hard to find (if it even exists). We take the responsibility of delivering good, factual information seriously and will never compromise the truth, or our values in our work. In other words, we’re doing something radically different to fight bad information. And the best part? Our research shows we’ve already started to increase civic participation among our audiences. We know our model works. Our reporting couldn’t come at a more important time. In 8 battleground states, our talented newsrooms are already intervening in the cycle of right-wing disinformation by providing honest, factual information at the source. We want to keep growing so we can spread good information to more communities, but we can’t do it without your help. [Please, can you take a moment to join our email list right now? By signing up you’ll get real-time updates about Courier Newsroom from our team, as well as opportunities for you to join the fight yourself.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T567acbb4-9299-4cc1-9feb-34fa33b8e522/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Together in this fight, The Courier Newsroom Team

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! While local newsrooms disappear and dangerous conspiracy theories take hold, legacy news outlets obsess about profits and the elite news consumers who will pay for their content. You're not alone if you feel like we’re in a full-blown information crisis. At Courier Newsroom we feel the same way – and we’re doing something about. As the nation's largest left-leaning local news network, we run newsrooms in eight key battleground states (and counting) where disinformation is spreading the fastest. Every day, our talented journalists deliver factual news stories to readers who live in areas where honest, local news is hard to find (if it even exists). We take the responsibility of delivering good, factual information seriously and will never compromise the truth, or our values in our work. In other words, we’re doing something radically different to fight bad information. And the best part? Our research shows we’ve already started to increase civic participation among our audiences. We know our model works. Our reporting couldn’t come at a more important time. In 8 battleground states, our talented newsrooms are already intervening in the cycle of right-wing disinformation by providing honest, factual information at the source. We want to keep growing so we can spread good information to more communities, but we can’t do it without your help. Together in this fight, The Courier Newsroom Team | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

Peter, it's Kevin McCarthy.

Let me start by saying thank you!

In 2022, we were finally able to fire Nancy Pelosi for good and restore Conservative leadership in Washington.

**_And make no mistake, we COULD NOT have done it without dedicated patriots like you. _**

That's why I'm incredibly honored to serve Americans like you as the Speaker of the House and to lead our NEW Republican Majority in Congress.

Because it's time to get America back on track and to finally restore a government that puts Americans first! **_But I need your help once again to get this done. _**

**The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

"House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public. "_

**Yes, you read that right - the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!**

They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.**

They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.**

So, they're trying to bury that evidence until everyone they've falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms - especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.**

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zt0d4bb1l68vtinnkt2vlvaerqs48goag68n1i8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ge4ob6c5h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Top issues of 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
I want to hear from you. What are the top issues you want to see addressed in the Senate? |
---
Fellow American -

A lesson I learned early from my parents was to ask the right questions and listen.

My parents ran our family-owned restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall, where they would listen to our customers talk about all kinds of issues.

>From watching my parents interact with customers, I learned early on that listening is just as important as asking the right questions.

**That's why I want to hear from you, Fellow American. If we are going to move our nation in the right direction, it's important for me to take a moment to listen to what YOU think are the most important issues in 2023.**

| [** 2023 Issues Survey
Begin Now -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61414998:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r)
---

I sincerely hope that you'll take just a few minutes right now to complete this important survey.

There's a lot happening in our nation. We have a crisis at our southern border, the cost of goods continue to soar, and we're still dealing with the lasting effects of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**[Your feedback will help me make informed decisions as a U.S. Senator, so please let me know what you think.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61414998:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r)**

In 2022, we hoped to Reclaim the Majority in the U.S. Senate, but we fell short.

Here's the good news, Fellow American - **Republicans have a narrow majority in the House of Representatives, and the 2024 election map is favorable to Republicans in the Senate. Democrat senators like Joe Manchin and Jon Tester will have to overcome Joe Biden's double-digit deficits from 2020.**

We can win next year - but we need a winning message TODAY.

Fellow American, I am counting on you to help craft our winning message. **[Please start Team Graham's 2023 Issues Survey NOW:](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61414998:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r)**

[** BEGIN SURVEY NOW -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61414998:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r)
---

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61414998:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r)

Lindsey Graham

P.S. As a United States Senator, it's my job to listen. Once I hear the feedback, I can integrate those ideas to find solutions to our nation's toughest problems. **[Please complete our 2023 Issues Survey, and after- I hope you will also include a personal contribution of $10 or more to help us RECLAIM THE MAJORITY in 2024!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61414998:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r)**

[** BEGIN SURVEY NOW -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61414998:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r)
---

* * *
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61414999:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61414999:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r)
---

We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. To receive only the most important emails, please [click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61415000:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r) We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os0U6ioDN1).

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61415001:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61415002:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61415003:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61415004:s0U6ioDN1:m:1:877327319:CA78CD0DAEC67F45C02DB337962A9F5A:r)

He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. To receive only the most important emails, please We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. name: 4Patriots
subject: America's Biggest Threat In 2023
body:
# America's Biggest Threat In 2023
**BREAKING** - A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe. In 2022 alone there have been over 70 attacks on the power grid with reports of six in Florida, five in Oregon and Washington. And according to national security experts, this trend is only going to continue. As America's power grid comes under increasing attack, will your city be the next to fall victim to this growing threat? It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. **National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid.** In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. [**When massive blackouts strike the U.S.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8e2a57895484e0d93af7d709094d486&_e=5HA6FsJRGH1pXmd6rCZPiKZxUAaB-rOGzqgCxxk7Wyu1x99UQcjFcJZi562EU75hlQvBwPw_o8_eFM6CA1vM5wAySKsGIe74qjm3erfVxGZAEPwOFYci02KfsnibcBo5d91VFozdqJVubdOQIdcJRzJUdtYYCv3OhSRg__IZ65zxN4qJ5mFcbdoisK3ZrHhThUmDPd2bBugrCgB3JH1HJO1rxizXQdSW6Z9oUF4MBKelVfAe43bPutbOZtTueU4yFsbY9QW2sjqM-uNwtspItfE62EWCQo-yFhaFmav4GVo%3D) Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: **Our crumbling electric grid.** When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. **"Our death toll would be staggering"** reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? [**What will you do when the power goes out?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8e2a57895484e0d93af7d709094d486&_e=5HA6FsJRGH1pXmd6rCZPiKZxUAaB-rOGzqgCxxk7Wyu1x99UQcjFcJZi562EU75hlQvBwPw_o8_eFM6CA1vM5wAySKsGIe74qjm3erfVxGZAEPwOFYci02KfsnibcBo5d91VFozdqJVubdOQIdcJR810tcs0RcE4FYihjNjeaCmAfSeaOiITZvjV8amR46lvG7ZFYWO6zcMUdPXDw3X1D650Thi5MWBns48ruLIxHCvggo7icv5g7k9A5TNy-BFdc99_4oydRJ_sD8-JZw8uqweGVTsU_R35t4hdTn6bZI8%3D) **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without** gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8e2a57895484e0d93af7d709094d486&_e=5HA6FsJRGH1pXmd6rCZPiKZxUAaB-rOGzqgCxxk7Wyu1x99UQcjFcJZi562EU75hlQvBwPw_o8_eFM6CA1vM5wAySKsGIe74qjm3erfVxGZAEPwOFYci02KfsnibcBo5d91VFozdqJVubdOQIdcJR1R_Lsp8kxft4YDfiOfApb8Br-7WeaY2keBMhxxON6F_MYlMHCbuf_BJi0-MI65XIyi2irDknEMbniTkVh5r2dXTi5knAF8ipZ24KxczZh5X4H_EuyXl5PGWV1FXslqX9AG5eLR8-cv47CkTQ7QtsgA%3D) **It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power.** That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. [**You can see a live demo of it in action here**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8e2a57895484e0d93af7d709094d486&_e=5HA6FsJRGH1pXmd6rCZPiKZxUAaB-rOGzqgCxxk7Wyu1x99UQcjFcJZi562EU75hlQvBwPw_o8_eFM6CA1vM5wAySKsGIe74qjm3erfVxGZAEPwOFYci02KfsnibcBo5d91VFozdqJVubdOQIdcJR4dcgAIP1prLdSbPeMMmbDv4Cmrela41YLKczhCNzfwTyQlHlfHHwxUXdKu2jOUe3IHOZIzBs6Wt4vkNFkG97mHgK70rj96x4DUDsA64pJ8Mydh90f2hSgfo-fDG0dQJrJGgWGg5CIM0pXu2cySc4D8%3D) Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... **[Click here to see it in action!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8e2a57895484e0d93af7d709094d486&_e=5HA6FsJRGH1pXmd6rCZPiKZxUAaB-rOGzqgCxxk7Wyu1x99UQcjFcJZi562EU75hlQvBwPw_o8_eFM6CA1vM5wAySKsGIe74qjm3erfVxGZAEPwOFYci02KfsnibcBo5d91VFozdqJVubdOQIdcJR0qvAd5u11npIzxP3BtthWfzlRciWTEj5mW62n28wC-fah0CmHk5HvOMA6LFHXvOWykpfY7mBHDKw9-PHET-kAh6D2R_57Mkmjofh4tBaBLFm8TGXEZRrmTC32HKvELqqzbl_TIN4zBcImD-kOtgoLM%3D)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters
---

"Our death toll would be staggering" reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power. That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Are American schools getting it right?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7lmrnk6o7tggeopi0rm43dg1259fmcv9l6u3fd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ie6pb3c5h2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans.
