name: Gov. Asa Hutchinson
subject: I’m appalled…
body:
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62238676:J6aDbdGNY:m:1:3331421248:352CA6E3D102CB38423FC61AE4CC5F0D:r)
---
Unlike the President, the Vice President has no enumerated nor implied power to declassify top secret and classified materials. _So, why didn 't Joe Biden return classified material from his time as Vice President that he instead kept at his private residence, next to his corvette? **[I'd like some answers, how about you Peter?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62238676:J6aDbdGNY:m:1:3331421248:352CA6E3D102CB38423FC61AE4CC5F0D:r)**_
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62238676:J6aDbdGNY:m:1:3331421248:352CA6E3D102CB38423FC61AE4CC5F0D:r)
---
In case I haven't yet had the opportunity to introduce myself, _I 'm Asa Hutchinson._ I'm a former Reagan-appointed U.S. Attorney, former Congressman, former head of the DEA, and former Republican Governor of Arkansas. _Now, having launched America Strong & Free, I'm fighting to keep America just that-strong and free. **[Learn more about America Strong& Free, and our mission here!

](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62238676:J6aDbdGNY:m:1:3331421248:352CA6E3D102CB38423FC61AE4CC5F0D:r)**_ I'm reaching out because I am appalled by Joe Biden's egregious mishandling of classified material-_**not once, not twice, not three times, not four times, but FIVE times!** **[Join me and America Strong& Free to demand answers from the Biden Administration.

](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62238676:J6aDbdGNY:m:1:3331421248:352CA6E3D102CB38423FC61AE4CC5F0D:r)**_ _Now, this does not excuse the concerns over former President Trump 's actions, but we do need to apply the law fairly **and that means President Biden 's actions must be investigated.

**_ I'm pleased that the Attorney General has appointed a Special Counsel to investigate and deliver to the American people, just that-but this never should have gotten to this point... _Joe Biden should 've never held onto classified materials in his private residence, **and after five spontaneous document revelations -like the American people-I'm not so sure we've hit the bottom of the barrel. [Are you?

](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62238676:J6aDbdGNY:m:1:3331421248:352CA6E3D102CB38423FC61AE4CC5F0D:r)**_ _**[Join me and America Strong& Free in demanding answers from the Biden Administration](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62238676:J6aDbdGNY:m:1:3331421248:352CA6E3D102CB38423FC61AE4CC5F0D:r)**_-add your name to the chorus of Americans fed up with Democrats' double standard, and together, we'll deliver something to the American people which we know they're anxiously waiting for... _real leadership_.
---
_**God Bless.**_
---
|
---
Governor Asa Hutchinson
---
---
|
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu6589t2dv36g8glkjqk702h77tjdco3lpbuf7oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ieepr4c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu2kffu9e5ck9m8k9m3o0mvbo31u0usn1vgtser8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ieepr4c5h2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp3ua73o6vc8rnb7dd4andgijvh5prr6bpeuhc50_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ieepr4c5h2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh8opukndf47f105584ronsjc8c408jko9m88lu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ieepr4c5h2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoim0n9u1ckqi1eqgrf3phslg7gukvtl5jt7211g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ieepr4c5h2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqptpo626ab1viuk1mfgfeim84s814nkvrp7065o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ieepr4c5h2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. name: American Action News
subject: Higher Education Opinion Survey
body:
Are American schools getting it right?
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv79vq4sglu58at7ped2qmudcjbsah274bh97ck8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ie1or4chh2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq1mq1818d5u7mvrjv9r378ftepgacbu2tvafjj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ie1or4chh2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgc9q4rhq0n26pju4du0tkgfjiqjqkrc981rt43o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1c5ie1or4chh2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

TONIGHT IS A VERY IMPORTANT MEETING! DON'T MISS THIS! JAN 23RD • 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA We are very exc
| |
---
|
---
## TONIGHT IS A VERY IMPORTANT MEETING! DON'T MISS THIS! JAN 23RD • 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
---
|
---
**We are very excited to have Dr. Douglas G Frank, Patriot Force, and Election Integrity Project ca will be with us. Don't miss this and make sure to bring your friends.**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## Dr. Douglas G Frank
---
|
---
Dr. Douglas G Frank is a world-renowned physicist with sixty peer-reviewed scientific publications, including cover and feature articles in the world’s leading scientific journals. His Ph.D. is in surface-electroanalytical chemistry, which combines chemistry and physics techniques for the manipulation and analysis of molecules on surfaces. He left academics in 1996, and has since done extensive consulting, inventing, and technical manufacturing, building electron microscopes, laser scanners, and precision manufacturing and control devices.
He is internationally known for his contributions to the bowing sport and manufacturing industry and helped to establish a special school for extraordinarily gifted youngsters near Cincinnati, Ohio, where he served as the Math & Science department chair for twenty-five years.
Recently, Dr. Frank was featured in two of Mike Lindell’s documentaries, (“Scientific Proof” and “Absolute Interference”) because he discovered several of the algorithms being employed to manipulate our elections.
Since December of 2020, Dr. Frank has been working incessantly for election reform with grassroots teams in about forty states. He’s met in person with Secretaries of State, Attorney Generals, dozens of legislators, and hundreds of local election officials, and is widely known for his informative and engaging presentations.
|
---
---
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=105604.181.1.8795b2d0860fc9b81fe9bd2a2cd7d961)

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18869?t=1001&akid=2916%2E346206%2EMM9JsA ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230123-2916-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2916_346206_MM9JsA&akid=2916%2E346206%2EMM9JsA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2916%2E346206%2EMM9JsA

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Friend, I've been in politics for a LONG time, and I thought I'd seen everything under the sun – _but boy, was I WRONG_.

**The sh*t the GOP comes up with is cuckoo! **

Republicans will do ANYTHING to gain power and enact their destructive agenda – even if it means attacking our country and their own party. It took 15 votes to confirm the leader of their own party!
**And just consider the insanity being proposed by the GOP: **
* **A national ban on abortion **and the end of reproductive freedom in America.

* **Cuts to Social Security, Medicare **and other programs American families rely on.

* Stripping back voting rights and undermining faith in our elections – with the ultimate goal of **destroying our democracy for their political gain.**

I won't mince words. The GOP we know today is not just wrong, problematic, or foolish. _It is_ __ _ dangerous_.**And for that, every member of the GOP must be held accountable.**

That's why I work with American Bridge. Our mission is to hold Republicans, including Donald Trump and his allies, accountable by keeping track of the dangerous, destructive things Republicans say and do and to make sure voters don't forget it.

**[I don't have to tell a top Democrat like you how vital our work is. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoq9c8qle8m09ujf0eq31l5k8u9qgi616ddrb0c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60ob6c1h2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6c7nttkr13cfvvcgsami2qe55vvp6eif0h9l1ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60ob6c1h2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zquatc9cvmcku28rnn66g7g25ecoicp6r40bfr50_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60ob6c1h2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Ten years of work
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf921o9mnuo1kos5b1nl6k13cobm0fuvfppiq2s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60pb3cth2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zok0sic0qedmj06kkv6fdkg7sded2lkjpfutogvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60pb3cth2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z819kl1pstogrppsf5crn8l9ldkhkllbg3jnusn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60pb3cth2bs)
---
[Get my book](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z70j5h9lmfpupt9gki42986sf9lbghcnqgg90jcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60pb3cth2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeuke9304584ej3rm6bc8qf3ko204hfmb91pspi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60pb3cth2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbioqkjtljm6oeir96sqqvecg4phk20r72v9l77g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60pb3cth2bs)
---
[Get my book](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlubcucr68kuh4a4fmo8ab83eoijiekmdok5t248_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60pb3cth2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs20bhu1lq1cturp6kgicv1jjtu0vm86f5grvg90_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg60pb3cth2bs)

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: backstory on my campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi there –
It is the honor of my lifetime to serve in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention.
That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and we’re under a time crunch to fill the gap. If you could split $20 right now -- between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
The backstory is this:
GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.
My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.
Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to my campaign and Serve America to help us retire our debt? Every dollar you give helps me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for hardworking families, and I’m grateful for anything you can give. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Willie=20Montague?=
subject: The First Black Speaker?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fredrick Douglass PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=41ccb58c2f&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello Peter,
There’s was so much talk on the Capitol this month about picking a House Speaker. The process we saw play out is something that I’m not mad about. Usually these things go on behind closed doors and we’re not allowed to see what happens. This time, it’s out in the open and twenty conservatives are fighting HARD for our values to be taken into consideration. **I’m with them.** I want to draw your attention to a specific moment though. When Byron Donalds was nominated on the Republican side, he was the **first** Black Republican nominated for House Speaker.He’s one of four Black Republicans in the House right now - and until the other day he was only one of two. **As a Black man myself, I hope you realize that’s somewhat of a problem.** The Republican Party has done more for Black prosperity and Black people than the Democrats... by far. The Democrats ONLY use them for votes in the worst possible way. **So why can we not get their votes? We have a serious outreach problem.**
| [CLICK HERE TO SUPPORT THE FREDRICK DOUGLASS PAC’S BLACK OUTREACH PROGRAMS!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=53c9844566&e=fdefed58de)
---
I want to draw your attention to something. Look at Georgia. The Governor’s race was won handily by Brian Kemp. Let’s talk about why that was.The Kemp campaign invested quite heavily in Black outreach and **DOUBLED** their percentage of Black voters that voted in their favor.Now, did they get a huge percent of Black votes? No. But they don’t need it. It’s a math game. With just 12% of the Black vote in the GOP column, Brian Kemp was able to get a **huge win** even against Stacey Abrams - a Black candidate.
| [INVEST IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH RIGHT NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f79b810ca6&e=fdefed58de)
---
My name is Willie Montague, I’m a Black man from Orlando Florida. I’m a pastor, activist and a lifelong Republican. I know that with the right amount of investment in Black outreach the GOP could secure MANY more victories across this nation... even in districts that we don’t typically think of.The issue? Our national GOP does **NOTHING** in terms of Black outreach. When I say Black outreach, I mean people on the ground... not just fancy Facebook ads and recruiting Black candidates. **You don’t even need to have a Black candidate to win Black votes. Look at the Democrats and Joe Biden.** Now, we’re not in an active election season so you might think the time for Black Outreach isn’t now? And **THAT** is where you’re wrong.Black voters HATE that Democrats only come around during election time. That’s why we need to be different. I need your investment in the Fredrick Douglass PAC **TODAY** so I can begin to organize our Black outreach programs to begin **IMMEDIATELY!** This huge Byron Donalds news is a perfect time. Did you see what Cori Bush said about Byron? Calling him a “prop” for white supremacy? Black people don’t respond well to that type of foolishness. **Our chance is now.****Rather than wait for the next election season to be a month away, let’s start NOW with our Black outreach programs!**
| [INVEST IMMEDIATELY BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=07b4e9d4aa&e=fdefed58de)
---
I’ve put together programs like this before — and I’m ready to step up and do what the national GOP won’t do. We need grassroots organizations like mine to empower leaders & take the lead on Black outreach.Without some kind of “angel investor” we don’t have the funds to do it and we do it on a rag-tag budget, but, we’re now ready to take this to the next level and need your help.For our efforts this quarter, we need to raise about $13,000 more than we have in the bank right now to reach the amount of people we want to reach.Our organization is set up to receive contributions of up to $5,000 from any person, but you can also donate as little as $10.00 and make a big difference for us. **The bottom line is this — we saw what happened in the midterms. No Red Wave materialized. We need a new strategy. Help ME make the change in Black outreach for the GOP so that we can have *actual* victories again.** Click below and lend your support to this very important cause!
| [INVEST $25 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=324acc958e&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [INVEST $50 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ee55df30b1&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [INVEST $100 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=eb168a1aed&e=fdefed58de)

---

name: VADEMS
subject: Staying on track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
critical deadline approaching

|
---
Derek, **Our first deadline of 2023 is coming up** at the end of the month and it’s critical we come out of the gates swinging this year. **There will be at least a dozen highly competitive races in the General Assembly this year,** where the balance of power in the Commonwealth and the future of our rights will be decided. These seats, in Northern Virginia, Hampton Roads, the New River Valley, and the Richmond suburbs, are going to need our support – and yours – if Democrats are going to win! [**Can we count on you to chip in, help us hit this critical goal, and protect the rights of every Virginian?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57689578/388781852/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230123-behind&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2UzYmQ2ZC01NDliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0vImpbLeIDs7O4g54kL00C9lNnzNzGe_zMpl4lJQVdA=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: PA Democrats
subject: On the 50th Anniversary of Roe v. Wade, abortion is on the line
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/PDP%20Primary%20Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
Had it not been overturned by the Supreme Court in June, yesterday would have marked the 50th anniversary of Roe v. Wade.
As you know, SCOTUS’s decision has left abortion access solely in the hands of state lawmakers. We’ve already seen the devastating effect that this decision has had in states all across the United States.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=12322email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=12322email]
Here in Pennsylvania, abortion is still safe and legal, and Governor Shapiro has vowed to keep it that way.
But although Governor Shapiro and legislative Democrats have promised to fight for abortion access, the future of reproductive healthcare in Pennsylvania hinges largely on next month’s special election. The three open House seats [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/01/pa-house-special-elections-court-ruling/] will determine whether Democrats hold the majority in the House.
Please consider donating $5 or $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=12322email] to help ensure that 3 pro-choice Democrats are elected in the February 7th special election!
Abortion access is on the line.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=12322email&express_lane=true&amount=10]

Harrisburg, PA 17101

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Joe Biden has had the strongest midterm congressional showing of any President in 88 years, and his legislative accomplishments for ordinary Americans have secured his place in history among our best presidents. He needs our support as he prepares for the State of the Union, and the critical 2024 general election.
body:
Joe Biden has our back, we need to have his
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1504c14e-33c7-4015-86f4-6a19ec6a87e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, _Joe Biden will give his State of the Union speech on February 7th. He will announce his intention to seek a second term as President of the United States. _ [**_Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight for Joe Biden's presidency!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1cefbfd0-4194-43e9-8006-8a3c1754c60f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The President's presided over a term that must be mentioned in the same breath as FDR's. He got GOPers to support bipartisan measures, passing a huge infrastructure bill and first gun-safety legislation in a generation._** **_He went it alone when Republicans refused. The Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS, helping students in debt to predatory lenders, funding historically Black universities, reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act._** _**When the midterm approached, The President aggressively called out MAGA "semi-fascists."** Per historian Michael Beschloss, he had the strongest midterm congressional showing of any President in 88 years. _So, now that Republicans (barely) have the House, all we get threats like this from empowered weirdos: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc540894d-4f51-4a43-94e8-a200ca3f2a7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_They're autocrats weaponizing government to destroy Joe Biden_\--via smear, lie, conspiracy--as Trump tried by extorting Ukraine's President Zelensky, resulting in his first impeachment. **

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf42a8ae0-50f0-4cf4-a393-a7dee0c02992/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

When the midterm approached, The President aggressively called out MAGA "semi-fascists." Per historian Michael Beschloss, he had the strongest midterm congressional showing of any President in 88 years. So, now that Republicans (barely) have the House, all we get threats like this from empowered weirdos: They're autocrats weaponizing government to destroy Joe Biden\--via smear, lie, conspiracy--as Trump tried by extorting Ukraine's President Zelensky, resulting in his first impeachment. | | | | | | | | We must support OUR PRESIDENT--who’s done an incredible job fighting this detritus. The charlatans and clowns. Please join us in backing Joe Biden, protecting the presidency and ensuring Republicans aren't rewarded for their betrayal of our country, by winning in 2024. Thank you. There will be no more important race--maybe in our lifetimes--than this one. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

body:
| | | | |

| | | [Sign the petition: Exxon must be held accountable for misleading the public on climate change! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab6d808d-91a4-4ef5-b8f8-dd82f0cc7f0c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | A bombshell new study revealed that Exxon climate scientists – since the 1970s – correctly predicted rising global temperatures due to the burning of fossil fuels. Their predictions even matched or surpassed the accuracy of some projections made by independent scientists! That means Exxon knew the full extent of the effects of burning fossil fuels. Their own scientists warned that continuing to burn fossil fuels would lead to "catastrophic" and "irreversible" consequences. And then Exxon executives decided to intentionally cover it up and downplay the risks for decades. These new revelations could help strengthen lawsuits against Exxon for covering up their knowledge of the impending climate crisis we’re now living through. We must hold Exxon accountable for the damage they have done and for intentionally misleading the public. [Sign the petition: Exxon must be held accountable for misleading the public on climate change! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td230cedf-f063-4807-906c-4de85bb0813d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | Derek, Last year was a historic one. It was a year that proved that when you work every single day to break through the same old Washington gridlock like I do, you get things done. So with the Senate about to go back into session today, I want to take a moment to reflect back on what we accomplished over the past year. Let’s start with the big wins. We passed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , a monumental investment in the fight against climate change and a never-before-seen step to lower the cost of prescription medication. We codified the right to marriage equality, putting protections for gay and interracial marriages into law. I also proudly supported the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , landmark legislation that addresses the gun violence epidemic. And after leading efforts to pass a historic investment in our nation’s infrastructure the year before, we are now seeing major job-creating investments in public transit and green infrastructure here in Virginia and across the country. But that’s not all. Here are just a few of the wins for Virginia and our country that we were able to secure under a Democratic majority.
* We passed major reforms to the _Electoral Count Act_ – legislation I’m proud to have helped draft – which introduces stronger protections for our democratic systems and prevents dangerous attempts to overturn the results of an election.
* In the end-of-year spending bill, we helped make important investments in college affordability, affordable housing, childcare, and Medicare coverage for mental health services.
* We helped free 4,000 beagles who were being abused at a facility in Cumberland, Va.
* We passed legislation I wrote to help Americans who have been saddled with consolidated student loan debt belonging to an ex-spouse.
* We expanded VA health care coverage for thousands of Veterans who were exposed to toxins through their service.
* We passed my bill to invest in American-made semiconductors, creating jobs and reducing our reliance on China.
* And we secured a raise for our troops and DoD civilian workers.

Now, as the new congressional session kicks off today, I’m already looking ahead to our next battles. We have work to do to hold tech companies accountable, strengthen our economy, and protect voting and reproductive rights. We also have legislative elections to win in Virginia, and much more. _[**Will you pitch in $5 right now to start 2023 off on the right foot?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57690239/388784975/1426249178?refcode=mw_em_230123_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU5NDM3NS01ODliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MIsz9GWdioUCloXwkuFmu_3NSKOQVwSgD5YdcQZYtuw=)_ I’m not slowing down any time soon. Last year was just a sneak peek of the progress we can make for our country when we break through the gridlock. Let’s keep this momentum going. _[**Pitch in $5 to help us keep making history for the commonwealth and our country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57690242/388784978/1426249178?refcode=mw_em_230123_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU5NDM3NS01ODliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MIsz9GWdioUCloXwkuFmu_3NSKOQVwSgD5YdcQZYtuw=)_ Thank you, Mark Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57690245/388784981/1426249178?refcode=mw_em_230123_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTU5NDM3NS01ODliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MIsz9GWdioUCloXwkuFmu_3NSKOQVwSgD5YdcQZYtuw=)**

name: Our Revolution
subject: BREAKING: Ruben Gallego is running against Sinema!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

BREAKING NEWS: Progressive Congressman Ruben
Gallego just got in the race against Kyrsten Sinema, and Our Revolution is
all-in!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8254?t=1011&akid=3912%2E5885482%2EsyOEJX ]We need to show as much momentum as possible on his launch day to tell
Sinema and her corporate donors that dropping out is her best option. Can
we count on you to chip in as a founding donor?

Sinema has repeatedly betrayed women, our democracy, workers, and more at
the behest of her billionaire donors — joining Joe Manchin to block
filibuster reform and single-handedly saving a specific tax break for
billionaire hedge fund managers.

We're sick of her selling out the American people so corporations can use
the filibuster to block new regulations and deepen wealth inequality.

Despite the overwhelming desire of voters across the spectrum for
affordable drug prices, Sinema personally made sure that nothing that hurt
big drug companies passed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8254?t=1012&akid=3912%2E5885482%2EsyOEJX ]Now, with a great progressive Congressman running against her, we
finally have a chance to make her pay for betraying her voters. Help
defeat Sinema by pitching in here!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8173?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230123_1_1&t=1013&akid=3912%2E5885482%2EsyOEJX ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8174?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230123_1_1&t=1014&akid=3912%2E5885482%2EsyOEJX ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »

Our Revolution has laid the groundwork in Arizona for Gallego's run for
years, holding rallies outside Sinema's office and confronting her at the
airport after she flew back from a weekend spa retreat with wealthy
donors.

If we stand together and organize, we will win this race.

When we organize, we win.

[ ]We need to show as much momentum as possible on his launch day to tell Sinema and her corporate donors that dropping out is her best option. Can we count on you to chip in as a founding donor? Despite the overwhelming desire of voters across the spectrum for affordable drug prices, Sinema personally made sure that nothing that hurt big drug companies passed. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I am running for Senate and asking you to become a Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount isn’t nearly as important as the donation itself. Thank you. - Ruben
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I’m going to change that.
#

Peter -
I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.
If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One, Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. Use this link:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/Founding-Donor**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ZeANVi&refcode=em230123-1-vsp&t=1&akid=263%2E734936%2EM76GXb)
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ZeANVi&refcode=em230123-1-vsp&t=2&akid=263%2E734936%2EM76GXb)
Here is the truth:
The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.
For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more.
Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong.
I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.
I am going to change that.
But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the Republican nominee is, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort. From day one.
And that is why I am asking:
[**Can you please contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can afford and become a Day One, Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this race. Together.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ZeANVi&refcode=em230123-1-vsp&t=3&akid=263%2E734936%2EM76GXb)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-jan23.sehrQ-&refcode=em230123-1-vsp&t=23&akid=263%2E734936%2EM76GXb)**
---

---
****

Ruben Gallego

I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m up for re-election and need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Ohio is already shaping up to be a must-win battleground.
#

I’m up for re-election in 2024, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. (There’s already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me.)
NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than this year’s Senate race in Ohio — and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.
[**Frankly, it’s going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s as we begin the new year?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrod-brown.a43gKG&refcode=em230123-1-7&t=1&akid=4908%2E6688874%2E4-1ahA)
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.
I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.
Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.
That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do — whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips — your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.
[**I need you in this fight, too. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in our average online contribution of $26 — or whatever amount makes the most sense for you.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrod-brown.a43gKG&refcode=em230123-1-7&t=2&akid=4908%2E6688874%2E4-1ahA)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-sherrod-brown.VAKd_H&refcode=em230123-1-7&t=21&akid=4908%2E6688874%2E4-1ahA)**
---
****
| **[Donate $26](https://act.markkelly.com/go/2335?c0=mek-em-sherrod-brown.BddtTl&refcode=em230123-1-7&t=22&akid=4908%2E6688874%2E4-1ahA)**
---
****

With gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: See the evidence for yourself
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0418%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kHl4roXdcodvQ6nmBvr%2byA&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657535%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EdDX7WqHv47PG4Mho3QQ1A&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657536%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X38SmXuFdTQMcNBh7bnMBA&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657535%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EdDX7WqHv47PG4Mho3QQ1A&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. name: DLCC Special Elections Team
subject: 6 special elections you need to know about
body:
Our candidates are geared up and ready to start working, but special elections are often underfunded and overlooked by voters. | | |
---
| | We’re almost a week away from the first of SIX special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire. **These next six races of 2023 are big opportunities for Democrats:**
* The February 7th races in Pennsylvania are **MUST-WIN** seats for Democrats.

* New Hampshire’s race is a **TOSSUP** that we must win to ensure we keep our razor-thin chamber margins.

* If we keep winning special elections in New Hampshire, we could **FLIP** the chamber sometime this year.

These next six races of 2023 are big opportunities for Democrats: The February 7th races in Pennsylvania are MUST-WIN seats for Democrats. name: Team Durbin
subject: The Senate is back today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Here’s what’s on the agenda
#
Peter,
Starting today, we're back to work in the Senate in the 118th Congress.
With support from folks like you, Democrats held our majority. Not only will Senator Durbin and his colleagues play an integral role in confirming President Biden’s judicial nominees this year, but Senate Democrats are also an absolutely critical check on the extreme Republican House majority.
**[As the new Senate session kicks off, contribute $5 to support our Senate Democrats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57672249/388743969/-1302392076?refcode=dd_em_230123_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ5N2NmZi0zNDliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrwMotsq1w-4k8ZPA709Rky90INzYRqakgkYV9r2xQ0=)**
Earlier this month, we asked what some of your top priorities were this year. You told us that action on climate change, enacting gun safety reform, protecting Social Security and Medicare, and restoring reproductive rights were top of mind, among many others. Senator Durbin will keep fighting to ensure your voices are heard in the Democratic Senate in the months ahead.
While Senate Democrats work to deliver for the American people and block the worst of the Republican agenda, they need our continued support to defend this crucial Senate majority.
Our hard work kept Mitch McConnell out of the Majority Leader’s office. But we can’t let up now.
**[Pitch in $5 or any amount now to back Dick Durbin and the Democratic majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57672251/388743971/-1302392076?refcode=dd_em_230123_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ5N2NmZi0zNDliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrwMotsq1w-4k8ZPA709Rky90INzYRqakgkYV9r2xQ0=)**
Thank you,
Team Durbin
**** ******** ****
********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57672253/388743973/-1302392076?refcode=dd_em_230123_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ5N2NmZi0zNDliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mrwMotsq1w-4k8ZPA709Rky90INzYRqakgkYV9r2xQ0=)********

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Dr. Nina is resolute: She is Fighting for Reproductive Justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
##
Yesterday was the 50th Anniversary of the Roe v Wade, the landmark 7-2 decision of the Supreme Court protecting a woman's constitutional right to choose-- making deeply personal decisions free from political interference. **7 months ago, a conservative majority on the Supreme Court overturned Roe taking away a right so fundamental to being human, the ability to make deeply personal decisions free from political interference.**
On this 50th anniversary of the Roe v. Wade decision, abortion, contraception, and other forms of reproductive healthcare are under attack in our nation.
Dr. Nina will always fight for women's rights as she has throughout her life! As the current President of the PA Chapter of the National Organization for Women (NOW)**, **she stands shoulder to shoulder with all who are fighting to restore this fundamental right.
We need your help [**__now__** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/0nuxNU5_3NG8BAWEPCGYBiI3WQwlSA6XCm4z--cOmyo=/wITNmr3uMT9JmUIYAxqWPc7WzY1DTV0jeM4-SaE3Iik=)- please [**_donate_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/0nuxNU5_3NG8BAWEPCGYBiI3WQwlSA6XCm4z--cOmyo=/wITNmr3uMT9JmUIYAxqWPc7WzY1DTV0jeM4-SaE3Iik=) to elect Dr. Nina fight this good fight as your next Philadelphia City Council Member at-Large.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kat=E2=80=99s_iPhone?=
subject: I’ll keep this short
body:
| | | | Friend
We are just one week away from the first end-of-month deadline of 2023, and I need your help if we want to close it out strong!
January saw dozens of Republican victories filling the news cycle. We started delivering on our promises on day one. As we continue to fight for the policies you need, I need your help to continue the momentum, and keep the wins coming!
I rely on supporters like you to keep me in the fight in Congress, and your donations help my Team and I afford more volunteers, more outreach, and more opportunities to meet you face to face.
This year it's vital that we step up our efforts and keep the Left from taking our freedom, but while I fight here in D.C., I need you to fight back at home!
Will you use this secure link to chip in and support our Republican leaders in Congress?
[https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/secure-link-click-here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dYWij-uAHwOUMFWCchwmBlGp1CR1adlLgEqYAK3tbt6TQ9cNoQ9Wd57dKb7id57s0jkVvAKbym80K7IwkFd2X6LkHVFaPYq7RxLXAxC9oh3GT5CkzD2uoGm9u_Hj0JtEgvUWsCqb8qhtE6rANkfHZemeT1_9I9vwurLGVH5Q0-jAZ49pDdpOo0JVJJsuy3zLmFk3WN6Oz2ai4BXmnJQTduzsKwPyjTqP&c=CduaPIcSOioKAo7K5z44a0gsnlAyw2RAIbxvJa8OsrImgDqhQMhTcw==&ch=xQe5WFnPZEEd9S_xY72uDqO16NkTyjh_TA3hjw9Dz1cid57MS3EkTg==)
Thank you for the continued support,
Kat

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Roth?=
subject: ALERT: SC Freedom Caucus Needs Your Help Now!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

The SC Freedom Caucus needs your immediate help. Here’s what happened:

Members of the SC GOP Establishment, with their arrogance on full display, held a press conference in Columbia last week to announce that the SC Freedom Caucus was officially kicked out of the SC House GOP Caucus. Why? Because they refused to sign the GOP’s “loyalty pledge”. Here’s what freshman SCFC member Thomas Beach tweeted:
_On my first day representing my constituents, I was removed from the SC House Republican caucus for refusing to sign a loyalty oath which would prevent me from informing voters which lawmaker killed Conservative bills._ - [@ThomasBeach](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=3a2b7f5f49&e=64ecec6d03)
The Establishment is so threatened by the SC Freedom Caucus that they are literally denying them their 1st Amendment rights to publicly discuss voting records, highlight the differences between them, and publicly disagree with them on policy issues.

Being kicked out of the GOP Caucus could mean several things – the worst of which is a torrent of special interest money used against them in primaries.

So please consider helping the SC Freedom Caucus NOW with the following:
1\. Donate to the State Freedom Caucus Network. The South Carolina Freedom Caucus, and our other states, won’t be able to wage any fight in the future if we don’t provide support and assistance. Please consider donating now.

---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=f018ed0ded&e=64ecec6d03 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE")
---
| 2\. Show your support by signing [this petition](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=d4bf3d1127&e=64ecec6d03). Even if you don’t live in South Carolina, we need the SC Freedom Caucus to know that conservatives across the country support and defend them. Please sign it today.

3\. Go onto social media and defend the SC Freedom Caucus. You can follow them at these links: [Facebook](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=b6c418bbfd&e=64ecec6d03) and [Twitter](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=c9dd63515f&e=64ecec6d03).

Imagine the members of the SC Freedom Caucus fighting for us and then getting kicked out of office because we weren’t able to help them. We must do everything we can to support and defend them.

When we provide training for our state freedom caucuses, one thing we routinely tell them is to be LOUD. Be loud about your conservative principles. Be LOUD about how the Establishment is undermining those principles. Be LOUD every day.

Now we’re asking you. Please be LOUD in support of the SC Freedom Caucus. They need you.

---
| [ ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=bd66d548d8&e=64ecec6d03)
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
State Freedom Caucus Network300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003-1021
[Add us to your address book](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=5bbeecf26a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=5bbeecf26a).
---

name: All On The Line
subject: Don't miss out on tonight!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
It's time to fight back and put people at the forefront of democracy.
|
---

Team -- maps are sparking strong opposition across the country. In states like Montana, lawmakers are engaging the public on their opinion of the proposed legislative maps.
NBC reports that minority groups feel that protecting minority voting rights isn't just the right thing to do, it’s fair and equitable in redistricting.**[ If you agree that gerrymandering goes against everything right and the very foundation of our country, join All On The Line on today at 8pm for the monthly virtual meeting.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57692025/388793889/684926256?utm_campaign=20230123_aotl_o_volcall2redux_redlitexopeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmYmFlMzAwLTYxOWItZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qvbPVGxZQpv5J2SqUAu9w8JUU8rX2crsf-WSq6-G4So=&emci=0f3c570f-339b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=4fbae300-619b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)**

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zglopn9cd58hk6dqd6klt0fqh6126086j2l21qmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg6ep70cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb34tms8fe7qmsq37navhn1llln5q3803niejp8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg6ep70cdh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvm6q2916feg61qq5577igdkguddeb41ftj2ka5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg6ep70cdh2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbv0oar8hvbcdeftlv0qvvk80a5h74qn0shfs4b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg6ep70cdh2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4abea97f2jv41766a52j2e0nfelkeoj940bf9h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg6ep70cdh2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl6eodise0ahj8qf4upn2e3kokcc9u48b1mp8j50_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg6ep70cdh2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zeap41c2547m06cifkf1947lnepaes54utregcc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg6ep70cdh2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3q076tvkauba1tna6gpdgd630jhf389i6kd9is0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg6ep70cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2gv3kgjif6ndft72j2fi3u0ctbiea9k5lathds8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clg6ep70cdh2bs)

subject: Why Biden is treated (D)ifferently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
| | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4641903520&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friend, I’m Claudia Tenney—I’m a small business owner, proud Marine mom, and conservative Congresswoman from New York. I said what we were all thinking.
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=376c3f7a8f&e=fdefed58de)
---
I wish I was surprised, but we know this is just how Washington operates. If you support the **big-government** , **pro-spending** , and **anti-liberty agenda** , **you get a pass**.
But if you try to disrupt any of that, **you’re now a target. **
---
[**CLEAN HOUSE IN WASHINGTON: CHIP IN >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=73d72584ab&e=fdefed58de)
---
**_FIRST_** , it was the IRS under Obama that illegally used its position to target conservative organizations, **_THEN_** , we saw the entire system try to take down and obstruct President Trump at every turn. **_NOW,_** we have the DOJ weaponized against parents and the IRS planning to go after the American people. The left has corrupted _nearly every_ facet of government. It’s time for conservatives to clean house and drain the swamp **before it’s too late.** _**[Friend, can I count on your support to help me lead this fight in Congress by rushing a critical donation by January 31st?](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b1420dd9a6&e=fdefed58de)**_
---
[**DRAIN THE SWAMP: $100**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=db417d342e&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DRAIN THE SWAMP: $75**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=261485e6c4&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DRAIN THE SWAMP: $50**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=25b3be1bf7&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DRAIN THE SWAMP: $25**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1017e27b3b&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DRAIN THE SWAMP: $10**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7393a314a6&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**DRAIN THE SWAMP: $5**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5c88669f40&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you,
Claudia Tenney

He’s dedicated his life to helping others and lifting up hardworking families. I’ve known Ruben ever since he came to Congress, and I have no doubt that he’ll be an outstanding Senator. But here’s the thing, team: This race is primed to be a three-way general election, so Ruben will need a groundswell of grassroots support. He needs you to chip in $5 or whatever you can to get him over the finish line. **[That work starts now. Let’s be honest: Kyrsten Sinema is more concerned about cozying up to the rich and powerful than working for the people.
She’s more focused on appeasing billionaires than passing life-changing legislation like protecting voting rights, lowering prescription drug costs, and raising the minimum wage. **Sinema has personally caused gridlock in the Senate that’s held up legislation that will actually help people _just so that she can fly to high-end fundraisers._**
Kyrsten Sinema has ignored Arizonans ever since she got to Washington. And Arizonans are fed up.
**Ruben is ready to turn things around and continue delivering for the people.[But to take on Sinema AND the GOP nominee, Ruben needs a massive grassroots team to have his back from day one. Ruben is a Marine combat veteran and longtime public servant. He’s dedicated his life to helping others and lifting up hardworking families. I’ve known Ruben ever since he came to Congress, and I have no doubt that he’ll be an outstanding Senator. But here’s the thing, team: This race is primed to be a three-way general election, so Ruben will need a groundswell of grassroots support. He needs you to chip in $5 or whatever you can to get him over the finish line. = | = Let’s be honest: Kyrsten Sinema is more concerned about cozying up to the rich and powerful than working for the people. She’s more focused on appeasing billionaires than passing life-changing legislation like protecting voting rights, lowering prescription drug costs, and raising the minimum wage. Sinema has personally caused gridlock in the Senate that’s held up legislation that will actually help people just so that she can fly to high-end fundraisers. Kyrsten Sinema has ignored Arizonans ever since she got to Washington. And Arizonans are fed up.
