name: Jorge Galicia
subject: How I went from a normal teenager to a freedom fighter
body:
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657653%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5HIUfO6kUs4T3wyHmEs8EQ&sysid=1)
Friend,

Venezuela used to be a democratic and free country. Before socialism devastated my country, I lived a life similar to most middle-class Americans. My childhood was pretty good.

**But around the time I became a teenager, the country elected Socialists into power. **

I started to notice the signs almost immediately. I could see the scarcity of food and goods around the country. Our quality of life declined rapidly.

A friend and I joined with others to fight back, but so did the State.

**Maduro’s political police captured my friend, forcing me to flee the country.**

Now, I'm one of 6 million Venezuelans who have fled since its economic, social, and political collapse. And I want to share my story with the world.

**The Dissent Project sends survivors of socialism, like me, to high schools and teaches students about this dangerous ideology.**

[_**To help us send speakers to more high schools, we set a goal to reach 100 new donors this month. Can you send a gift of $50, $35, or even $10 today >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657654%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iOOA1T5DX%2b5ZfAOWBrMLAg&sysid=1)

I want to share my eyewitness perspective of how a country with so much wealth and promise completely collapsed.

Living under socialist tyranny has shown me firsthand the dangers of letting the State grow and take over every aspect of your life.

>From a very young age, I have been speaking out about the very real damages caused by socialism.

**Now it's my life’s mission to win the fight! **

And one of the best ways to win the fight against socialism in America is to warn the next generation.

Please help me share my experience with high school students by supporting the Dissident Project.

[_**Friend, can you send a generous gift today? Even a donation of $10, $35, or even $50 makes a big difference. Click here to support the Dissident Project >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657665%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uGL6uh5ds0Jtwoh1wbJQAg&sysid=1)

**We’ve already reached 3,000 students with the first talks for our Dissident Project. **

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657653%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5HIUfO6kUs4T3wyHmEs8EQ&sysid=1)

I recently shared my story of standing up to Venezuela's socialist regime with Cinco Ranch High School. I reminded them that we can’t take our freedom and our economy for granted. If we follow the wrong ideas, America could follow Venezuela’s example.

Socialism isn’t a thing of the past -- people are dealing with the consequences every day!

Socialism destroyed my life. And I’m convinced that if students hear my story, they will understand the truth behind the socialist doctrine.

**Please _click belo_ w to help me share my experience with more high school students.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657666%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ONai11Ws9YescVUTjCPvgg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657667%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WzKeV1i1ib7vJSDDQgs55Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657668%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gmjfwn9QS1iOReARNohaJA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657669%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z%2bv26hehaCxWpRqDrl0Mig&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657660%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xr%2bT7J4g%2bmXuoel71r2fhQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657661%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1pdC1SUmLiqBPFdEcIGzAQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657662%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3DmOXXw4mMTbSWYO5R79TQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657663%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ulVAou4jgOpgQgi5AO0v5w&sysid=1)

Jorge Galicia

name: Rep. Ashley Hinson
subject: I stand with Jim Banks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
Join team Banks >>

|

Hi Friend,

It’s Congresswoman Ashley Hinson, and I’m reaching out to express my full endorsement of Rep. Jim Banks for Indiana’s open U.S. Senate seat.

[ ](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=d0dc9193a0c64fdb89af13b4d60fcdcd&_e=TWVcAIAziddKMbhTJ4se7-f8IKmKtAwHZaXIdPucGdowz6fwwY-w--G6ai7iPqGbSzstUZzHyd8YGi6uB_K8KXXQn_Li-4Fj2OGgIxDMdNZ0LjFcpuxP_GtWQR6zLiNMusz0R8y0xfCe6i9JWktVpdAGMS415a1jREXM09OznWqyZpfekHHN8mNiFYcBWlaIqSd7CbEN0qMy8gOcTliozwLy95Hn9LrNlViWJPPXU2p7zfIPm8Tq3UqqahQNsB-e2xzrKMB_Vwy_7zrRg2-G2E5uKy43emQNTuSZ_LazAggL3gcblJ3F273fALj_yPRQOoT5Ff_fn3FbgGL_SXNP2aYSNRLSNlvZYLePWwZEIH2Gdxw8z_-ae2cJID8VugK9WnCeqCxZosH8xgt6EZZm9UEwPdPHVrkh6EUjv8pjNIe-sZbdJHYDJCbBm-9u4hz5tqIZDlFwUqhMofm78qgSF2aBvjeSxF7dq_1KLQQwsy9EvkHlip5VKdyJwRE5MLiU-SlfJTnLD4eXnCNi3N0y_DvX0F83u6YLf2VkdVDKDm0%3D)

My good friend Jim is a Hoosier who has proven time and again that he is one of the most conservative leaders in Congress. He will undoubtedly bring his pro-America, anti-woke attitude to the U.S. Senate.

**[_That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting his campaign. By becoming an early supporter, you are ensuring that Hoosiers will be represented by a proven conservative leader._](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=d0dc9193a0c64fdb89af13b4d60fcdcd&_e=TWVcAIAziddKMbhTJ4se7-f8IKmKtAwHZaXIdPucGdowz6fwwY-w--G6ai7iPqGbSzstUZzHyd8YGi6uB_K8KXXQn_Li-4Fj2OGgIxDMdNZ0LjFcpuxP_GtWQR6zLiNMusz0R8y0xfCe6i9JWktVpdAGMS415a1jREXM09OznWqyZpfekHHN8mNiFYcBWlaIqSd7CbEN0qMy8gOcTliozwLy95Hn9LrNlViWJPPXU2p7zfIPm8Tq3UqqahQNsB-e2xzrKMB_Vwy_7zrRg2-G2E5uKy43emQNTuSZ_LazAggL3gcblJ3F273fALj_yPRQOoT5Ff_fn3FbgGL_SXNP2aYSNRLSNlvZYLePWwZEIH2Gdxw8z_-ae2cJID8VugK9WnCeqCxZosH8xgt6EZZm9S-fwjIDosUH2y3fR7jb8IgUIPJs_jRfMQDvvF6sVNwipndXD3d3VfRFmjVdEHSAEWAGx3Dz6HF9FcwCVYKHobW78aRgb028zeE5igJP0RToFemMpQ7pTZDYD69vY3-hJ0TOpVT883QjBcrMFJdjQG4%3D)**

| [ **BECOME AN EARLY SUPPORTER** ](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=d0dc9193a0c64fdb89af13b4d60fcdcd&_e=TWVcAIAziddKMbhTJ4se7-f8IKmKtAwHZaXIdPucGdowz6fwwY-w--G6ai7iPqGbSzstUZzHyd8YGi6uB_K8KXXQn_Li-4Fj2OGgIxDMdNZ0LjFcpuxP_GtWQR6zLiNMusz0R8y0xfCe6i9JWktVpdAGMS415a1jREXM09OznWqyZpfekHHN8mNiFYcBWlaIqSd7CbEN0qMy8gOcTliozwLy95Hn9LrNlViWJPPXU2p7zfIPm8Tq3UqqahQNsB-e2xzrKMB_Vwy_7zrRg2-G2E5uKy43emQNTuSZ_LazAggL3gcblJ3F273fALj_yPRQOoT5Ff_fn3FbgGL_SXNP2aYSNRLSNlvZYLePWwZEIH2Gdxw8z_-ae2cJID8VugK9WnCeqCxZosH8xgt6EZZm9axkb7QPVHzmxUGkhG4xczBsBz-hijMTGPKUYE4pEdFUM2899vImNNfJCInCiCG0r7Sms5EIzjPWi5Eb8e3yxJNn_AwhvUrb3qAqOJSfFDCSPPGPtGxD6Schb1EVMwBe1yeTLiKsMvcbVQWd33tHPy4%3D)
---

As Jim kicks off his campaign, he needs all the help he can get. He is an America-First leader who is not afraid to stand up for what he believes. We cannot pass up this opportunity to have him represent Hoosiers in the Senate.

Jim Banks will help us put an end to the nonsense coming out of D.C. He will continue to fight for government accountability, protect your freedom, balance the budget, and make our streets safe.

clean_body: Join team Banks >> | Hi Friend, It’s Congresswoman Ashley Hinson, and I’m reaching out to express my full endorsement of Rep. Jim Banks for Indiana’s open U.S. Senate seat. My good friend Jim is a Hoosier who has proven time and again that he is one of the most conservative leaders in Congress. He will undoubtedly bring his pro-America, anti-woke attitude to the U.S. Senate. | As Jim kicks off his campaign, he needs all the help he can get. He is an America-First leader who is not afraid to stand up for what he believes. We cannot pass up this opportunity to have him represent Hoosiers in the Senate. Jim Banks will help us put an end to the nonsense coming out of D.C. He will continue to fight for government accountability, protect your freedom, balance the budget, and make our streets safe. YOU have the power to support the right leaders who will ensure a Conservative future. I sincerely appreciate your support! Rep. Ashley Hinson Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2022 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

And so many across the Commonwealth |

My name is Jenn McClellan. **I am a Black woman, working mom, a 17-year state legislator, and the Democratic nominee for Virginia’s 4th Congressional District.** Our special election campaign is a chance to make history — _no Black woman has ever represented Virginia in the United States Congress._ As a Black woman, I bring a whole new perspective that has not had a voice in the Virginia delegation. And I’ll be honest with you, that perspective has been long underrepresented in Congress. When it comes to the issues, from voting to health care access to equality under the law, I will put my experience as a legislator and unique personal perspective to work and get results for you and your family. [_**With our election weeks away and early voting already underway, it’s critical that Fourth District voters hear our message. Will you split a $25 donation between our campaign and HER Time at this important moment?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57675483/388756839/-2007807648?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjRkMGIxYTUtM2Q5Yi1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=z1NHshhWFRMNd172giHOfoNEWLfKO7IBON6NLt86aR8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57675484/388756840/-2007807648?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjRkMGIxYTUtM2Q5Yi1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=z1NHshhWFRMNd172giHOfoNEWLfKO7IBON6NLt86aR8=)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Banning Members of Congress from trading stocks just makes sense!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HvOk_1kqjHMWEMIbqaAmNRn1cPz4_cXv9qdDQUaPpGU=/68R2SwwbpNqSV8yv8lfGA6kzPQhwSBbHNbz8OLQLkV8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230123-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Peter,

Now that this new Congress has begun, I have once again introduced my bipartisan legislation to ban members of Congress [and our spouses and dependent children] from buying or selling individual stocks.

In our day-to-day work, we receive briefings and have discussions with industry leaders that should inform the governing choices we make, not the stocks we buy or sell.

Our constituents should know that with every vote and decision, we are looking out for our constituents, not their financial portfolios. To continue this important mission in Congress, I need your support. [_**Will you contribute to our campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/HvOk_1kqjHMWEMIbqaAmNRn1cPz4_cXv9qdDQUaPpGU=/68R2SwwbpNqSV8yv8lfGA6kzPQhwSBbHNbz8OLQLkV8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230123-1-EM&amount=25)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/HvOk_1kqjHMWEMIbqaAmNRn1cPz4_cXv9qdDQUaPpGU=/68R2SwwbpNqSV8yv8lfGA6kzPQhwSBbHNbz8OLQLkV8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230123-1-EM&amount=25)
---
The consensus on both sides of the aisle is clear: Americans don't want their members of Congress trading stocks while doing the business of the people. My bill is a commonsense ethics reform.

clean_body: | Peter, Now that this new Congress has begun, I have once again introduced my bipartisan legislation to ban members of Congress [and our spouses and dependent children] from buying or selling individual stocks. In our day-to-day work, we receive briefings and have discussions with industry leaders that should inform the governing choices we make, not the stocks we buy or sell. Our constituents should know that with every vote and decision, we are looking out for our constituents, not their financial portfolios. To continue this important mission in Congress, I need your support. | The consensus on both sides of the aisle is clear: Americans don't want their members of Congress trading stocks while doing the business of the people. My bill is a commonsense ethics reform. Work like this is vital, and I'm proud to spearhead it in Congress. To make sure I can maintain the promising momentum behind passing my bill, I need your support. | | | | | | | Thank you for your confidence, Abigail * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. name: CRITICAL RESPONSE TEAM (via VPP)
subject: SIGN NOW: Demand the Senate Codifies 𝑹𝒐𝒆 𝒗. 𝑾𝒂𝒅𝒆
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we need to take immediate action >>
| **50 Years After _Roe_ , Abortion Rights are Under More Attack Than Ever**

Now that the MAGA majority on the Supreme Court has overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Republicans are ramming through the most EXTREMIST abortion bans in history.

We REFUSE to let them destroy our rights, so we’re launching an urgent petition to demand the Senate codifies reproductive freedom into federal law. [**Please, add your petition signature by MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-rvw/?source=VPP_20230123_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=6093%2E878179%2ETPKOJF) | [**25,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: DEMAND THE SENATE CODIFIES _ROE V. WADE_ »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-rvw/?source=VPP_20230123_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=6093%2E878179%2ETPKOJF)
---
Republicans will stop at NOTHING strip Americans of their reproductive rights and make abortion a crime - _and they’ve almost succeeded._

Many states have already moved to make abortion illegal, prosecute people who have abortions, **and now they’re introducing a nation-wide abortion ban.**

The best way we can stop them is to codify _Roe v. Wade_ as the law of the land.
[**We’re counting on you to add your signature and urge Congress to codify Roe v, Wade into federal law. This cannot wait. Sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-rvw/?source=VPP_20230123_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=6093%2E878179%2ETPKOJF)
[**25,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: DEMAND THE SENATE CODIFIES _ROE V. WADE_ »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/codify-rvw/?source=VPP_20230123_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=6093%2E878179%2ETPKOJF)
---
Thanks for standing for what’s right,

VPP
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6093%2E878179%2ETPKOJF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6093%2E878179%2ETPKOJF).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6093%2E878179%2ETPKOJF) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=6093%2E878179%2ETPKOJF). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6093%2E878179%2ETPKOJF)

body:
And Heritage Action is spearheading the effort to make it happen...
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr0qjbhgegcfsltrrl3fphech9vup2t8jauolv28_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68pj3chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ueombdjk62o66tbhmaon4p5lclrmad9jc2qnfcjickr7actkmuoj7d30slqn6o77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sjkcoor9cr0s1pbcphgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)

---
Fellow conservative, It's no secret that our border is a complete and utter disaster. A mix of incompetence and deliberate decisions have led to...
* Deadly drugs flooding across the border into our neighborhoods.
* Millions of unvetted illegal immigrants crossing and released into our communities
* Cartels essentially seizing operation control of the border.

And at least one person who MUST be held responsible:**Biden 's Secretary of Homeland Security, Alejandro Mayorkas.**
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkmrf6fhcau3eokl19olr9t0b45glp1203u5ocv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68pj3chh2bs)
---
**Congress****MUST****impeach Secretary Mayorkas for: ** ➡️ For presiding over the worst border crisis in history ➡️ For lying to Congress about the border ➡️ For slandering Border Patrol agents ➡️ For failing to maintain operational control of our southern border
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z44i1n4481eh9tj6p5vk8ug4uga1q8bcd3f4e710_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68oj2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6dlsutd7adfjh7eutl7eu37oph2c7ee5p3m2308_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68oj2chh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4bf7ngsoa8slv75bvi8rbo8qtrluqlmki9jcmv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68oj2chh2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztcs6houqdjbqhbufi3vbih9ntu4tckavpb7j4ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68oj2chh2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvofmqhcthiois0lj9r6vl6ha3r8jkbj46rvrv5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68oj2chh2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcjcrjvtivhhgh351a11crrp0susa91k31ua5fng_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68oj2chh2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z843kd4bvmpd60d8vihcucc9o7ui25uvk6g4rs0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68oj2chh2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zknphs4fkejfjtg5ed8v77avvkqad5ghjrr3fd70_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68oj2chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3togki6hubinndi111hofduf3irfp2ne3r0g6gg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli68oj2chh2bs)
---

| | Folks, I’m not really big on Mondays. But to get ready to take on the day, I like to give myself a bit of motivation. **Here’s what I read this morning that got me motivated** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57694106/388802516/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230123_FR_MONDAYMOTIVATION_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmRiNWQ1Ni02YjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9vrVdXRgGWGM2Gi3EwrAzZFl8M-zpaGOPl3p_dfv8AY=) I know we can retake control of our House Majority and put the far-right GOP out of power. So, I’m asking you to [**chip in to keep NV-03 blue in 2024 and crush any dreams the GOP may have at expanding their majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57694107/388802517/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230123_FR_MONDAYMOTIVATION_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmRiNWQ1Ni02YjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9vrVdXRgGWGM2Gi3EwrAzZFl8M-zpaGOPl3p_dfv8AY=) | | | [Chip in: Send the GOP Packing >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57694108/388802518/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230123_FR_MONDAYMOTIVATION_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmRiNWQ1Ni02YjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9vrVdXRgGWGM2Gi3EwrAzZFl8M-zpaGOPl3p_dfv8AY=)
---
Let’s be honest, Republicans massively underperformed in a midterm that was meant to benefit them. And now, outlets are agreeing: **there’s a strong chance that Democrats can retake control of the House.**
But the catch is that we also need to hold incredibly close battleground seats like mine here in NV-03. If we concede even a single seat to the GOP in 2024, that makes retaking the House all the more difficult.
And as I write this letter to you, there’s no doubt that Kevin McCarthy is handpicking a Republican candidate to run against me. _**We need to be ready to defend this seat with everything we’ve got.**_
I’m determined on this Monday to fight like hell against the House Republican Majority and hold this seat in 2024. It’s our only path to winning back the House and continuing our fight for working families.
[**So I’m asking – will you chip in $25 or more to support my campaign? Your contribution will help me keep the GOP’s radical agenda at bay and hold my battleground seat.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57694109/388802519/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230123_FR_MONDAYMOTIVATION_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmRiNWQ1Ni02YjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9vrVdXRgGWGM2Gi3EwrAzZFl8M-zpaGOPl3p_dfv8AY=)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Do you know how it worked, and why it doesn’t?
body:
You’re someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what’s happening in Washington, D.C.
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj9c33dner6aoeldl7tujmovahf6s9ekpeh0llg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli64p31cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, You’re someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what’s happening in Washington, D.C. So, I have a question for you. Do you want to know how the Founders thought the United States Congress should work? Watching the news today, I’m sure you’ve asked yourself that. If you’ve ever wondered, then I encourage you to learn more with our free online course, **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t.”** [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeo46bktj8256seuojjh91c4gdt9kk1gdoii7ea0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli64p31cth2bs) This popular online course is available in a special DVD box set for viewing in your home or with a small group for a limited time. **You can order your copy at this secure link:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkm1crgorn7t15otl0n9ltdl8aifbn2g2un89mp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli64p31cth2bs) The 11-lecture course explores the Founders’ understanding of the legislative power and how Congress should work, the Progressive rejection of that understanding, and how it has affected American politics. On a personal note, this was one of my favorite courses to film. I really enjoyed it, and I know you will too. You can get your DVD box set of **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** right away with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. Your gift will support our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts that **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans nationwide. As you may know, these online courses, including **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** and Hillsdale’s other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, are only possible because of the **generous support** from donors like you. Your gift really matters because Hillsdale doesn’t take a dime—NOT EVEN ONE PENNY!—from the government. Even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. So, will you help us **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans with free online courses and other educational programs by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today? Your gift will really help so that we can maintain our independence and our critical educational outreach. Here is a secure link for you to get your DVD set of **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** : [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zun7mgfda2fr5ol9l7bal196a3i3t6rupp5qlhhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli64p31cth2bs) In this critical time for America, know that we are deeply grateful for your friendship and support. On behalf of Hillsdale College, I hope you enjoy the course! Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2z815p6gradl9df5cbubl6v0u0h27ei54kq5opj8g).625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9j56h6ilg3nokc9krskmagb8au5prv4fpb3438g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli64p31cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Katie Porter
subject: The courage to do more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Yesterday so many of us woke up to the news of another tragic and senseless shooting.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16402%2E3422442%2E7zcBRV)
Derek,
Yesterday so many of us woke up to the news of another tragic and senseless shooting. Just twenty one days into 2023, this was our country’s twenty third mass shooting. It’s unacceptable that Congress has not done more to prevent gun violence.
On Sunday I went to Monterey Park, and alongside other officials I prayed for the lives lost.
But I am acutely aware that we need more than thoughts and prayers. Following the shooting in Uvalde last year, Congress passed bipartisan gun violence prevention measures. We’ve always known that would not be enough. We need to firmly stand up to gun manufacturers and the Republicans who are beholden to them and demand change.
My thoughts are with Asian American communities across the country. I hope the Lunar New Year brings safety to all, and gives Congress the courage to do more.
Katie Porter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=2&akid=16402%2E3422442%2E7zcBRV)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=16402%2E3422442%2E7zcBRV)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: lol, rural school destroyers
body:
|
---
| | In honor of National School Choice Week...

Check out the article below addressing what I think, is the biggest fear of the anti-choicers...

They think school choice will KILL rural schools.

(But it turns out, the exact OPPOSITE is true)

>>> [See why here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=2e192da102&e=dea908e0fe "see why school choice is good for rural folks") 👉🏻

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s.**

This week I hope to get introductory hearings on two of my bills:

_Bill #1:_
Makes a child's immunization status **OFF LIMITS** for the state of Idaho, courts, and CPS when they're deterring parental rights (because what a parent chooses to inject or NOT inject into their child is their choice)

_Bill #2:_
Repeals the so-called "Blaine amendment" in the ID constitution that the Supreme Court rendered null and void over the past few years. This makes it so public funds can flow to religious schools (they already CAN, we just need to kill the "dead letter" in the Idaho constitution). This one is more of a housekeeping thing.

\---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Do you know how it worked, and why it doesn’t?
body:
You’re someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what’s happening in Washington, D.C.
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkpkh4bors1085spc57tvjvcnglt5hh1i32co6c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli6co34c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, You’re someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what’s happening in Washington, D.C. So, I have a question for you. Do you want to know how the Founders thought the United States Congress should work? Watching the news today, I’m sure you’ve asked yourself that. If you’ve ever wondered, then I encourage you to learn more with our free online course, **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t.”** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjpsei5bm5uumuoorlorcu64fvdpt74keqslhlvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli6co34c3h2bs) This popular online course is available in a special DVD box set for viewing in your home or with a small group for a limited time. **You can order your copy at this secure link:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zacl745fb7u0hft28p6uv4s3kre1cfnhdq1fsrro_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli6co34c3h2bs) The 11-lecture course explores the Founders’ understanding of the legislative power and how Congress should work, the Progressive rejection of that understanding, and how it has affected American politics. On a personal note, this was one of my favorite courses to film. I really enjoyed it, and I know you will too. You can get your DVD box set of **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** right away with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. Your gift will support our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts that **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans nationwide. As you may know, these online courses, including **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** and Hillsdale’s other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, are only possible because of the **generous support** from donors like you. Your gift really matters because Hillsdale doesn’t take a dime—NOT EVEN ONE PENNY!—from the government. Even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. So, will you help us **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans with free online courses and other educational programs by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today? Your gift will really help so that we can maintain our independence and our critical educational outreach. Here is a secure link for you to get your DVD set of **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** : [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmk61eiu20rlnhv6k4egni1ff4f170l6rfv7b7do_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli6co34c3h2bs) In this critical time for America, know that we are deeply grateful for your friendship and support. On behalf of Hillsdale College, I hope you enjoy the course! Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zka5om7d63dnh7rjjdnejq6pus37fsdqqo3tb3j0).625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk7sv3pmut7353s23khcb45bgeochtjklfms2ojo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli6co34c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: They’re already trying to stop us.

body:
---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxFUcGOpCAU_Bq9aRAR7IOHnTVz2E7m2j0nQsPTZhbQAI7T-_ULpmc3ISSvql6lUg-GhjJCTrTpaakGLHssZakHjHCLGtw2jJzapqYndmIIdZ1spo4AKwjatavV4oRRH9Fvdq3lYsv7IJW8yQkxRSXQrk_epMWkz3PX4A5KM9xjXEPR_ijwa3oB5OahTnYeVDbJmPiESljwWorqY9EuVtPmlBc6aDdXSWR1jABJasQeNh2rBn1lv_bVZz-fZEU7pmBJQ-3i4MFXA2qG_6iwy-ZimjuUpi1abkHpzSYErNCG36cnHpbNy7zppOEYt1y5JyOFXYWeXeK-G-M3syz2Bn6untn40c_Ng_idYjnYAw_i22BxEY4UucsIXK4PH3iPWA7FndEqcX8IpmFTl9uvA7xrlfob0XVEkpn3t9IPat21MTrQfJo5xz_ukeIZPT2Ggr0UGB97GB_V4zN5ub7R8-U8Vpf35lqNtCN7ZvHP9MfHCv-kT5f6qCWjbPwLyre2oQ)
**[URGENT: Trump Is Already Facing a Lawsuit to Stop His 2024 Campaign](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxFUcGOpCAU_Bq9aRAQ2oOHnTVz6WSu3XMiCE-bWUCDuG7__YLp2U0IyauqV6nUg75hnNKONRdW6h6rC1aqND1GmKAGk4bTjjQ163jHEWpb1UwtBV5QdBhf68VLq79i2N1aq8WVj55NmpEOcYwvjCpJ6KjViLEkwGCkY1Pa_hHjuhXkR4Hf09tA7QHqZBdAZ5OMyd9QSQfBKFl9LcbHatq9DtJsxs9VEjkTI0CSWnlsu4lVg_5kP_Iesl9IsoIMKVjSMLd4eIrVgp7hPyrdsvuY5halaY9OONBmdwkBJ40Vj-mFb8seVN70ygqMidD-xSjpVmlmn7jvxsRol8WNEObqlU2c_YwB5K8Uy8OxiU1-Gyw-wpkidxlBqPUZNnFBPIcS3hqduNvVje5QtNtP8GF06m9A9wEpbj8_ytDr9TDWmo3l08w5_nmPFM-a6dkX_K3A-NzD-KweX-nb_YNdb9ehun0292pgLT0yi3-mPz5X-Cd9udRnLRnlw18Jf7bx)
\- Bloomberg**
Friend,

They’re already trying to stop us.

A NOBODY has filed to run against Donald J. Trump in 2024 and has decided to SUE him to STOP him from running. _**They want to take us down.**_

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We could really use your support, Peter. | |
---
**Kentucky's governor's race expected to be most competitive election in 2023**

[**We need all hands on deck to win the most competitive race this year. Rush a donation right away to re-elect Andy and continue making progress for Kentucky →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57678903/388769319/-982401185?refcode=em23_230123_compet_fnd_gq_act___ABfG_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230123_compet_fnd_gq_act___ABfG_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2FiZDBkOC00NzliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6neO7STYr35onRAOszU42A1HDIrOY--zLBLzzLEeM7c=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57678905/388769321/-982401185?refcode=em23_230123_compet_fnd_gq_act___ABfG_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230123_compet_fnd_gq_act___ABfG_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2FiZDBkOC00NzliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6neO7STYr35onRAOszU42A1HDIrOY--zLBLzzLEeM7c=)
---
Peter —

Experts predict that the Kentucky governor’s race will be the _**most competitive election in 2023.**_

As the only Democratic incumbent governor up for re-election this year, we can expect Andy's opponents to throw everything they can our way. His opponents are already up on the airwaves, and outside spending is flooding Kentucky to defeat Andy.

We need to fight back right away if we're going to win this tough race. That's why our team is working overtime to reach Kentuckians in every corner of the state. **And we could really use your support.**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: A question for you
body:
You’re someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what’s happening in Washington, D.C.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgv2a6a36jbvop866dpeb3m3revrc1m9i8o2i2ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli62oj0c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, You’re someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what’s happening in Washington, D.C. So, I have a question for you. Do you want to know how the Founders thought the United States Congress should work? Watching the news today, I’m sure you’ve asked yourself that. If you’ve ever wondered, then I encourage you to learn more with our free online course, **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t.”** [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcbhi7961ja42vop4pttam8khjq4qr169verinb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli62oj0c5h2bs) This popular online course is available in a special DVD box set for viewing in your home or with a small group for a limited time. **You can order your copy at this secure link:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbmcisahlccuqp9qjkm7jkv7rc12ulfqi5ul51e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli62oj0c5h2bs) The 11-lecture course explores the Founders’ understanding of the legislative power and how Congress should work, the Progressive rejection of that understanding, and how it has affected American politics. On a personal note, this was one of my favorite courses to film. I really enjoyed it, and I know you will too. You can get your DVD box set of **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** right away with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. Your gift will support our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts that **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans nationwide. As you may know, these online courses, including **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** and Hillsdale’s other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, are only possible because of the **generous support** from donors like you. Your gift really matters because Hillsdale doesn’t take a dime—NOT EVEN ONE PENNY!—from the government. Even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. So, will you help us **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans with free online courses and other educational programs by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today? Your gift will really help so that we can maintain our independence and our critical educational outreach. Here is a secure link for you to get your DVD set of **“Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn’t”** : [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6a5a7ti72jh07qnvec6bd8puers4imc2akd61r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli62oj0c5h2bs) In this critical time for America, know that we are deeply grateful for your friendship and support. On behalf of Hillsdale College, I hope you enjoy the course! Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zfb82tarvsrjqhugrdv89ujvkv06h3os4kl91170).625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8nied0dvjdndpqv05igo6qir830hfm7kfuin0n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli62oj0c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpf6puut33s14jigqenh3mp56cji3bh92so4uji8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli6ao30shh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpbos9lb60pd2kq8sj0vu0420p7u4mhlpq18f5ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli6ao30shh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh1hpi6vb0fsm0qor33ejv40keukq91bps4ub4u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cli6ao30shh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Dear Friend,
Mississippi has some of the worst health outcomes in America. Too many people in our state struggle to find affordable care.

**Come to this lunch and listen to Dr. Lee Gross explain how we can improve healthcare across Mississippi.**
---

| President of the Doctors for Patient Care Foundation, Dr. Gross provides many thousands of low-income families in Florida with care that they need, in a way that is affordable. Listen to him explain how a similar model could be used to improve patient care in our state.

As this is the first event of the year, tickets will sell fast. [CLICK HERE](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=eaf7230c94&e=5703353baa) to book now.

I look forward to seeing you!

Douglas Carswell

_A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott:_ Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so **[please, click here to support my efforts to keep freedom alive in America.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=6bc7d96b797d4a22898b8cf061047eed&_e=o3OKULtSXkBoi2eVQIwlzByvN43jnqXzu2JcZL0BJhTs387C4WZR1Inrm8McVOvLM4snZEN9_2wT6aBcA2iiJWUl-gg5AAgYAIbzjPte-7x6xmdl5lH5zuXngtPRheyXKXfMA1vA4KuhdagUkws4BLTnavhYIJSr0mYs5xjTP9CN34JiEy4Gkjg3MgqTmMlhGqxl4YY8CHxIG4RwpB23BZhHc7fKmwhI3-HOjvZcg1HcT7KmoBViYOGbS7se6P90DcZr62VOueNehOfJxcEYmIU87h00D8dYWpDQ_eSrJ93cEZKal_YlfNNbqfaU1BXFWNjrR4UjAvJnFaoc0-NOP1G4WnCHpFqdu5635iaI7NFOsD-cdSjH1lwpiihO0mTv)** Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: We have to make abortion access the law of the land
body:
For the first time in our district’s history, West Michigan women are represented by a woman who will always for their right to make their own healthcare decisions.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57696194/388810064/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230123-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWYwN2UxNy03NjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQ9JCRmenV9ty9bffYJ57aIS6kH-F2dy8RW2TrbsuQo=)
---
| Folks,

This week should mark the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the landmark case that protected reproductive rights for all Americans. But last June, the conservative-majority Supreme Court overturned the precedent set by _Roe_ , returning the question of abortion access to the American people through state laws and U.S. Congress.

In their first weeks in the House majority, Republicans have already passed a bill designed to attack abortion providers and make reproductive healthcare more difficult to access – **and it’s only a matter of time before they try to institute a total federal abortion ban.**

I was proud to cast the first pro-choice vote in West Michigan history. **For the first time in our district’s history, West Michigan women are represented by a woman who will always for their right to make their own healthcare decisions.**

We must take back the House majority in the next election cycle so that women in West Michigan and across the country have the right to make their own healthcare decisions – without any say from politicians. [_**Can I count on you to chip in $10 or more to my re-election campaign right away to ensure I can stay in Congress as a strong pro-choice advocate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57696195/388810065/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230123-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWYwN2UxNy03NjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQ9JCRmenV9ty9bffYJ57aIS6kH-F2dy8RW2TrbsuQo=)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Redistricting: 1 year later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230123 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230123]
Team,
It’s hard to believe it, but it’s been just a little over a year since Michigan’s district lines were redrawn.
Seeing the final maps for the first time was a bittersweet moment for me. I was thrilled to continue to represent the people of mid-Michigan, but sad to lose parts of North Oakland County and so many folks who had been so vital to my previous campaigns. The district also doubled in size, added three new counties, became more rural, and lost many of the suburbs of Detroit.
I also knew what a tough fight we were in for. My race was the most competitive House race in the state, and one of the ten most competitive in the entire country. And it showed: we ended up having the single most expensive House race in America.
So how did we pull it off? We treated this race like I was running for mayor in 30 small towns at once. We were on the ground in places that hadn’t seen a Democratic candidate in decades. We may have been running in some brand new areas, but when you knock doors, listen, and put in the real work, it pays off. It’s really that simple.
We’ve definitely had a lot of unknowns thrown our way over the past year, and I’m sure there will be many more to come. Having resources is essential, so if you’d like to help us keep putting in the real work with folks across Michigan, I’d love it if you considered contributing below. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230123]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230123]
Elissa

About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district.

clean_body: Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230123 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230123] Team, It’s hard to believe it, but it’s been just a little over a year since Michigan’s district lines were redrawn. Seeing the final maps for the first time was a bittersweet moment for me. I was thrilled to continue to represent the people of mid-Michigan, but sad to lose parts of North Oakland County and so many folks who had been so vital to my previous campaigns. The district also doubled in size, added three new counties, became more rural, and lost many of the suburbs of Detroit. I also knew what a tough fight we were in for. My race was the most competitive House race in the state, and one of the ten most competitive in the entire country. And it showed: we ended up having the single most expensive House race in America. So how did we pull it off? We treated this race like I was running for mayor in 30 small towns at once. We were on the ground in places that hadn’t seen a Democratic candidate in decades. We may have been running in some brand new areas, but when you knock doors, listen, and put in the real work, it pays off. It’s really that simple. We’ve definitely had a lot of unknowns thrown our way over the past year, and I’m sure there will be many more to come. Having resources is essential, so if you’d like to help us keep putting in the real work with folks across Michigan, I’d love it if you considered contributing below. [] CONTRIBUTE [] Elissa [#] About Elissa Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district. Contact Elissa P.O. BOX 4145, EAST LANSING, MI 48826 campaign@elissaforcongress.com [campaign@elissaforcongress.com] [] [] Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress [] Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress Elissa Slotkin for Congress PO Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826 United States Click here [] to receive fewer emails

name: Ron Wyden
subject: It’s who we’ve become as a country
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57696839/388811991/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWE1NmRmOC03ODliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tT74vfnJ1hLGjgzP4V4VoHxP6t4sw0P2dRbPYEHPDsA=&emci=500238d5-749b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=1aa56df8-789b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Yesterday, Americans awoke to the news of yet another mass shooting. It seems that these days, no place is safe from the scourge of gun violence: churches, grocery stores, schools, movie theaters, and just this weekend, a Lunar New Year celebration. **The fact is that mass shootings are happening almost every day in America. The data doesn't lie: this isn't just an isolated incident; it's who we've become as a country.** This weekend should have been a time of celebration and joy for the Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) community across our country. Instead, it has been a time for mourning. And mass shootings like these will only continue until meaningful gun safety reforms are passed. **But Senate Republicans have made it clear they're willing to let innocent Americans die from senseless gun violence as long as they can keep cashing their campaign checks from the NRA.** Republicans will tell you this is a regrettable reality of preserving our constitutional freedoms and offer more empty thoughts and prayers. I call _absolute bull_. It makes me angry. It makes me sick. And it makes me want to fight with every fiber of my being. I will continue standing on the front lines, fighting for stronger, common-sense gun safety measures. For me, this includes strengthening background checks and a comprehensive ban on assault weapons. **A mass shooting every day isn't my America.** Holidays turned deadly isn't my America. We must come together as a country and truly fight for change and not let up until we see it happen. _Ron_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate.

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51b57b1b8a9c44ca8307da6bc17640d5&_e=jhBH99606yFchH6yFmkgc_7nTAEhASD4qXPXYHu54Zgqi-9EglVFXoaE5sZirCsSFzLZGM-gJuxkjwsMYseWzTDDDt36FGBO4yq3FHHtlSux1eiFlU2rbcq-o1S-Z-jB_wyyPP8mjd_kINaNfs9mhRsDcPkHWgwcBbnl9fi3Sy51fwjw8yrF2yRpQeT22YlK208CCCDmJ-8l8zbGwcUonu_2YUKopP5NAfryoIjrmZWTPhY9i4-1MsU62tyG0XjhYTGTV-6sXhfnGpE3VoJfLAcBXr4xVmF76VIgddBSEPXLW7y6Pk6Vb6QhP5-YmyNC53ZP-hpKQxJtvboJ8pHw09LfEr2xe99LA0DQIn6LAvmoDCpUgDCXHrNULW0nDezI3rxfPJRK3yBLsxqIB1satw%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"

Electing Rev. Warnock in the December Senate runoff was not an easy feat. We were up against the entire GOP establishment and a candidate with national name recognition. But we organized across the state – increasing our margins and cutting our opponent’s.

Organizing everywhere works. Talking with voters across the state, in rural communities, small towns, suburbs, and cities is the key to winning Georgia. Between November and December, our organizing team **_flipped_** two counties: Baldwin and Washington Counties in central Georgia. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57689058/388779025/710125701?refcode=20230123.1_GADems_1Z&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmFiNDI4MC01MDliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_xxk1D-dQk6W-2jUUELcOD2lDSRtG4TGKirHV5Jtws=)

Here’s why this matters: We need to defeat Donald Trump in 2024.

If we make investments across Georgia _**NOW**_ , we can work to not just win Washington and Baldwin counties, but also flip other Republican bastions and swing counties, increase our margins in Fulton, DeKalb, Cobb, and Gwinnett, and cut Trump’s leads in heavy red counties.

[**_So here’s the deal: When we organize, we win. But we can only fund our organizing program with the support of grassroots donors like you. name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Is there ANYTHING we can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
What if we told you that Ruben starts in a very strong position to win this race, but it will require us having the resources to run a winning campaign from day one?
#

Peter -
Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to become a Day One, Founding Donor to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for US Senate?
What if we told you that Ruben starts in a strong position to win this race, but it will require us to have the resources we need from day one?
What if we told you that Senator Sinema starts with many millions already in the bank, raised from the special interests who want to keep her in power?
And what if we told you the ONLY way we can compete with that is if lots and lots of people contribute what they can, when they can. Starting today.
Now, I know that one single donation from YOU may not seem like it would make a huge difference, but by the time you get to this point in the email, a few people have made their donation.
Now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because it all adds up when we’re all in this together. And that’s the only chance we have. So what do you say?
[**Can you please contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to Ruben Gallego’s Senate campaign? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in. Become a Day One, Founding Donor right now.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ZeANVi&refcode=em230123-2-15&t=1&akid=259%2E734936%2Es73XM_)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of immigrants and the daughter of a WWII veteran.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friend – I've always put people over profits and fought for a strong middle class and good-paying jobs. Here's why:
| | |
---
Friend – I've always fought for a strong middle class with good-paying jobs and lower costs. Here's why:
I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. As the first in my family to graduate from college, I worked multiple jobs – including as a waitress at Caesars Palace – and took out student loans to make ends meet. I know a thing or two about what it means to roll up your sleeves and get to work.
Now, I'm humbled to serve Nevada in the U.S. Senate. And as a former union member myself, I'm honored to represent the hardworking families and union workers who have helped build our great state.
**I'll never stop fighting for progress, but I need your help. I'm up for reelection, and experts at _The Hill_ say I'm one of the GOP's top targets for defeat. So I can't keep Nevada blue without people like you by my side.**
[**That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, friend.****Will you chip in $5 or more to my reelection campaign so we can keep Nevada blue and defend Democrats' Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57697467/388818255/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2309-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdiYmU4Yi03YjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmY72RX3abgKQjU98xmCYd4Zp1o-hwETc7dXD9JT4BI=)
I strongly believe that if all of us stand firm and do our part, we can move mountains to make positive change happen. I'm grateful for your support.
Thank you,

Jacky

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We need your help to fight back against the Moderate PAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is
really important.

The Moderate PAC, a PAC focused on protecting entrenched, establishment
incumbents who uphold the unfair status quo, plans on raising $20 million
against us.

From Axios: “Why it matters: The PAC is looking to scare off progressive
groups like Justice Democrats from targeting moderates or tipping the
scales for any seat in which an established Democrat might retire.”

We urgently need your help to fight back against the Moderate PAC. With
our own fundraising steadily declining, your support is more important now
than ever before.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230123-27194&t=1001&akid=27194%2E1203867%2EDB1DJk ]Will you rush a $3 contribution before midnight tonight
to help us fight back against the Moderate PAC who plans to raise $20
million to spend against us?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230123-27194&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27194%2E1203867%2EDB1DJk ]Contribute $3

The corporate-backed establishment will stop at nothing to prevent more
nurses, bartenders, principals, community organizers and regular people
from entering the Democratic Party in Congress.

They would rather buy elections than let working-class progressives even
run. They will do everything in their power to make themselves richer at
the expense of robbing poor and working-class Americans.

We’ll never have as much money as the political establishment because we
refuse to take a dime from corporate PACs and we don’t have billionaire
funders who can help out if we fall short of our goals. Our work is truly
powered by tens of thousands of people like you chipping in because they
believe in what we’re fighting for.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230123-27194&t=1021&akid=27194%2E1203867%2EDB1DJk ]We need your help to fend off the Moderate PAC in order to recruit and
elect the next generation of Justice Democrats. Please make
your first
contribution of $3 right now.

Together we will fight back against the corporate-backed establishment and
continue to work to transform the Democratic Party by electing
progressive, working-class champions to Congress.

Thank you,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27194%2E1203867%2EDB1DJk ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27194%2E1203867%2EDB1DJk ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230123-27194-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27194_1203867_DB1DJk&akid=27194%2E1203867%2EDB1DJk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27194%2E1203867%2EDB1DJk

name: Joe Shepherd, President of United Rural Democrats
subject: What's next for URD in 2023 🔜
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Peter, are you with us? | | | Hi Peter, Since 2020, I have traveled over 179,000 miles to 47 states. This wasn't a vacation road trip. **I've been committed to**** _listening_****to the needs of rural Americans and organizing communities to create**** _real, lasting_****change.** Throughout these trips, I've spoken to hundreds of thousands of rural Americans from all walks of life. I've gone to rallies and farms to small towns and big rural cities. **We accomplished so much in 2022, electing a new wave of Democrats to reinvigorate rural towns and achieve progress for Americans. But in 2023, we have so much more to do.** Here's what's next for United Rural Democrats in 2023: 1️⃣ Train the next generation of organizers and operatives in the heartland. 2️⃣ Support Democrats running for down-ballot races across the country and set up Democrats for success in 2024. 3️⃣ Connect with voters across rural America to revitalize Democrats in communities that have been neglected for far too long. **[Peter, I'm so happy you're with us on this journey in 2023. subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a3dbe23efa044fea2b303568fb1fc8d&_e=lxjf3NBbIT5JdEcStdLsBI-R07qJyMKPWAmEaF5orb40RtLBPPH-vPifZoSPquNg6Wr1bUCv19qNnAu9JS3OH1VzHYNTUUjQhXbu9b1BFIeO1dmzJnxXJJBHLBkgcyR7bYg25Jd1ZKQxQboVOzxgl5L0h6x0RR8yJE70AwvnxO9FSdl4zjJCZ_XTeW2TB9cM1ZvdBaejomT07H12vT9T1Tp2hdZ_Dzr4rwBC5TquhUfj3Abi5hoqS7t2o1z34YXdV8mOyUHQOxSHQrSoHGEftk72xQFZFoLY59a4D4RkE98Yv6s7yOcMwnIAC6mR2MLA)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a3dbe23efa044fea2b303568fb1fc8d&_e=lxjf3NBbIT5JdEcStdLsBI-R07qJyMKPWAmEaF5orb40RtLBPPH-vPifZoSPquNg6Wr1bUCv19qNnAu9JS3OH1VzHYNTUUjQhXbu9b1BFIeO1dmzJnxXJJBHLBkgcyR7bYg25Jd1ZKQxQboVOzxgl7BmsTf_fhiNxqc8z0RFyMIi-eowheiBu26B4rUjyrtRDAjJm2flKTomyrS1AzJRDqOTl7Tbl3JZ3j8ktgau1krvM6IGk-mxjhF9nV6EBtxsv51o7vyU7LyHpww-Z4lzVul5izRNAuar8M6shY_QaI3muEk4Cw_P-N0BT7V6Dgvg)

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a3dbe23efa044fea2b303568fb1fc8d&_e=lxjf3NBbIT5JdEcStdLsBI-R07qJyMKPWAmEaF5orb40RtLBPPH-vPifZoSPquNg6Wr1bUCv19qNnAu9JS3OH1VzHYNTUUjQhXbu9b1BFIeO1dmzJnxXJJBHLBkgcyR7bYg25Jd1ZKQxQboVOzxgl3q0wWKhGlE19jLrbE2Dj-XRJY1tsWQ5KoE9B3pPx171Ylce1f3BODtsHwxq5a6G0xc83Qps5-Y5AYxa2YCwxBeu24Q3MeOmNR9Zo_-dbsshdYQTn6dw41sbpXfgpvCRZhB1jQE5DZEDxAvwC2tmiE3wM9rnMWywg8ECN1o3wMPC)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a3dbe23efa044fea2b303568fb1fc8d&_e=lxjf3NBbIT5JdEcStdLsBI-R07qJyMKPWAmEaF5orb40RtLBPPH-vPifZoSPquNg6Wr1bUCv19qNnAu9JS3OH1VzHYNTUUjQhXbu9b1BFIeO1dmzJnxXJJBHLBkgcyR7bYg25Jd1ZKQxQboVOzxglx8fhbOasCWjH0gEmPiH-8EB9BJ0CXXT8Ioihwhy_CfP8Kmhcl_5ayUtYY4RhXJAYAkYt3xaMMqYCHqwRFYUUFIriF8DHfNyAv_TssFtPoBU7ZZGeZ-7D3kDtQXSSgabsPmtE1KNYZ-gp5YRgyzvGhBsqinWQcIe9k6RdylHr_Qp)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a3dbe23efa044fea2b303568fb1fc8d&_e=lxjf3NBbIT5JdEcStdLsBI-R07qJyMKPWAmEaF5orb40RtLBPPH-vPifZoSPquNg6Wr1bUCv19qNnAu9JS3OH1VzHYNTUUjQhXbu9b1BFIeO1dmzJnxXJJBHLBkgcyR7bYg25Jd1ZKQxQboVOzxgl8KhMyN29XeILe0g-aOtPKiDkWRMMaSKP0GSO2jqW0F0G-LsZDq423XcPt4PHVYBILoS1221vm_w3A0_vN__CO4gfrkneERrlKwnQE5MhSWD44AFTzY2suy_RSS06WHfxrXYL8BpE58jBy_OF6COuMXJtqzAyhdmwO7Nw-ms-pLH)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a3dbe23efa044fea2b303568fb1fc8d&_e=lxjf3NBbIT5JdEcStdLsBI-R07qJyMKPWAmEaF5orb40RtLBPPH-vPifZoSPquNg6Wr1bUCv19qNnAu9JS3OH1VzHYNTUUjQhXbu9b1BFIeO1dmzJnxXJJBHLBkgcyR7bYg25Jd1ZKQxQboVOzxgl4ci8PZBRGsmmhkmX3Us02CnE3kjfQTr0yqkAIUvXUfx5RvjxjllEmJ63-0hoJkC8Ls1tjblJyjxIN-zRVYTKwJ9f0h4nThz6l0XR9h0URWreuOeozo8ow8YEZNi5sr473gMNiS0hk0rdSt2GTMW7Upq1tVJZqgHywYAgKorhDp7) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a3dbe23efa044fea2b303568fb1fc8d&_e=lxjf3NBbIT5JdEcStdLsBI-R07qJyMKPWAmEaF5orb40RtLBPPH-vPifZoSPquNg6Wr1bUCv19qNnAu9JS3OH1VzHYNTUUjQhXbu9b1BFIeO1dmzJnxXJJBHLBkgcyR7bYg25Jd1ZKQxQboVOzxglyQ6ZosaNxA7DCfJMHdLF5eScnDPM8cnNJsrg1EcJrLuF6t2bie5y6bVW-eUxQqPS_iCub7gEnR3zG_HtpTFeZUeAfinWSdo9UbieUrEw1GqAcjBu_Sp6hZ_pLVMGm7cx5TbldSyMzJwb1VyBLdVVrEiIAgMQol6VUrFFIlxGIrP)

The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a3dbe23efa044fea2b303568fb1fc8d&_e=lxjf3NBbIT5JdEcStdLsBI-R07qJyMKPWAmEaF5orb40RtLBPPH-vPifZoSPquNg6Wr1bUCv19qNnAu9JS3OH1VzHYNTUUjQhXbu9b1BFIeO1dmzJnxXJJBHLBkgcyR7bYg25Jd1ZKQxQboVOzxgl-nSMmZFsCKFEZfz_kOqur2Fjw0ErCYc6qzSuzrXv6m4_MaCcBuCfOVMQsHZ_9N7GX6yEd7D5Z_-FtAqx9R1d_JkzEBndY_G7P-sQdSNfxa5SYkBivQb9-GDdmUwmta2koZmzNizMwE2bBGyEe1kiEHzfmMXE03wqC7iWdt1JeCX) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: SIGN ON: Ban ALL congressional stock trading!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter, will you sign our petition so we can prohibit politicians from trading stocks?
#
Peter,
In a healthy democracy, politicians should be serving their constituents, not their own wallets. But right now, members of Congress can still buy, trade, and sell stocks — literally profiting off of confidential, insider knowledge.
Does that seem right to you? [**If you think it’s time to draw the line and ban ALL congressional stock trading now, sign onto Pramila’s petition >>**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/sign-ban-congress-stock-trading/?source=em20230123-2083&t=1&akid=2083%2E420207%2Em8SOOm)**
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/sign-ban-congress-stock-trading/?source=em20230123-2083&t=2&akid=2083%2E420207%2Em8SOOm)**
Members of Congress shouldn’t be able to use their positions to enrich themselves instead of delivering for their constituents. It’s corruption, and it’s unacceptable. That’s why Pramila co-sponsored the TRUST Act to prohibit members of Congress from trading stocks -- period.
Voters are looking to progressive leaders like Pramila to give them a reason to trust in our government and democracy again. That’s why we need to enact strict rules on stock trading and ensure that members of Congress aren’t profiting at the expense of the American people.
[**Every signature will help make Pramila’s case for banning all congressional stock trading once and for all. Will you add your name to our petition right now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Oppose-GOP-Abortion-Ban/?source=em20230123-2083&t=3&akid=2083%2E420207%2Em8SOOm)
**[Sign the Petition](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Oppose-GOP-Abortion-Ban/?source=em20230123-2083&t=4&akid=2083%2E420207%2Em8SOOm)**
Thank you for your continued support!
In solidarity,
-- Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230123-2083-footer&t=5&refcode2=2083_420207_m8SOOm&akid=2083%2E420207%2Em8SOOm)**

clean_body: Peter, will you sign our petition so we can prohibit politicians from trading stocks? Peter, In a healthy democracy, politicians should be serving their constituents, not their own wallets. But right now, members of Congress can still buy, trade, and sell stocks — literally profiting off of confidential, insider knowledge. Does that seem right to you? Members of Congress shouldn’t be able to use their positions to enrich themselves instead of delivering for their constituents. It’s corruption, and it’s unacceptable. That’s why Pramila co-sponsored the TRUST Act to prohibit members of Congress from trading stocks -- period. Voters are looking to progressive leaders like Pramila to give them a reason to trust in our government and democracy again. That’s why we need to enact strict rules on stock trading and ensure that members of Congress aren’t profiting at the expense of the American people. Thank you for your continued support! In solidarity, -- Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Kelly Tshibaka
subject: What I’m Doing Next

While I was extremely disappointed about the outcome of the 2022 Senate race, and what that means for Alaska and our great nation, it opened my eyes to an emerging threat facing our democracy: Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV). When Alaska first used RCV in 2022 (including my U.S. Senate race), it had the lowest voter turnout since it first became a state, 63 years ago. In contrast, the rest of the U.S. had one of the highest voter turnout rates. If Alaska had seen normal voter turnout, we likely would have had different election results.
