clean_body: | | | | You’re the First to Know. | Peter, I believe things happen for a reason. While I was extremely disappointed about the outcome of the 2022 Senate race, and what that means for Alaska and our great nation, it opened my eyes to an emerging threat facing our democracy: Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV). When Alaska first used RCV in 2022 (including my U.S. Senate race), it had the lowest voter turnout since it first became a state, 63 years ago. In contrast, the rest of the U.S. had one of the highest voter turnout rates. If Alaska had seen normal voter turnout, we likely would have had different election results. RCV "confuses voters", " escalates negativity", " increases costs", and results in " voter suppression". To address this threat, I want my supporters to be the first to know that we've started Preserve Democracy, a non-partisan group dedicated to increasing voter turnout and fighting the spread of RCV. HELP US LAUNCH PRESERVE DEMOCRACY IN THE NEXT 23 HOURS ON 1/23/23 AND BE PART OF OUR FOUNDERS’ CIRCLE! | | | | | | | We have a short window in time to combat RCV and mobilize voter turnout. The 2024 elections are right around the corner! I’m still fighting for those who feel they have no voice, and I know I CAN COUNT ON THE DONORS IN OUR FOUNDERS’ CIRCLE to fight alongside me. Thank you, | | Kelly Tshibaka Preserve Democracy | =

name: Greg Casar
subject: Common sense gun legislation now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
My heart is with the victims and residents of Monterey Park.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57697795/388829779/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzc5ZTk1OC04MDliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lrt3HIutJrOI-7UcpZCb5L6619QYY5SPlrRDuwgSsqs=&emci=6641a447-7a9b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a379e958-809b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
Peter,
This weekend in Monterey Park, California, a gunman opened fire on a crowded ballroom where people were gathered after a Lunar New Year celebration. Leaving 11 dead and 9 injured with conditions ranging from stable to critical.
**Monterey Park is a city in Los Angeles County that is majority composed of Chinese and Taiwanese immigrants, and first generation Asian-Americans. This should have been a day of celebration and my heart is with the victims and residents of Monterey Park and the entire Asian American community.**
**This is the deadliest mass shooting since the Uvalde school massacre in Texas last May** , which took the lives of nineteen children and two adults. It has also only been two months since the deadly killings at Club Q in Colorado.
**Peter, we haven’t even finished the first month of 2023 and as of yesterday we have already seen 33 mass shootings in the U.S:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57697797/388829781/359820318?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzc5ZTk1OC04MDliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lrt3HIutJrOI-7UcpZCb5L6619QYY5SPlrRDuwgSsqs=&emci=6641a447-7a9b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a379e958-809b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
**These mass shootings are an epidemic, and a direct consequence of the inaction and failure of elected leaders to pass common sense gun legislation to prevent these tragedies.**
Gun violence has affected all of our communities in one way or another, and that’s why I am ready to work with my colleagues in Congress on removing systemic failures and implementing policies we can take action on right now which will save lives, including:
* **Passing universal background checks**
* **Ending permitless carry**
* **Creating safe storage rules, including the passage of Ethan’s Law**
* **Reinstating the Violent Crime and Law Enforcement Act**
* **Repealing the Protection of Lawful Commerce in Arms Act (PLCAA)**

Monterey Park’s city motto is “Pride in the past, faith in the future”, and while there is no way to truly repair the tragedy that has occurred, we can honor that city’s faith with actions that will provide us with safer communities for all.
— Greg
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57697799/388829783/-893385334?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzc5ZTk1OC04MDliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lrt3HIutJrOI-7UcpZCb5L6619QYY5SPlrRDuwgSsqs=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Monterey Park
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I represented Monterey Park for more than a decade in Congress. The people of Monterey Park are good and decent people, who know their neighbors and look after one another.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1615%2E5257348%2E5upFv7)
Derek —
It’s hard to know where to begin.
I’ve spent countless hours on that Monterey Park intersection, at Garfield and Garvey, when I had the honor of representing that beautiful city. At community events, parties, and, yes, Lunar New Year celebrations. It’s the beating heart of the region.
And now ten people are dead, and ten others injured, because of yet another mass shooting. Right in our backyard.
That a mass shooting happened on a day of joy, of celebration, on Lunar New Year, makes it even more painful. That such tragedies take place every week is unendurable.
**_Today, our hearts are with the people of Monterey Park, to help them grieve, and recover. Tomorrow, we must finally act._**
Although the city is now outside my district, I represented Monterey Park for more than a decade in Congress. The people of Monterey Park are good and decent people, who know their neighbors and look after one another. And on Lunar New Year, they were out all day celebrating with their family and friends.
We don’t know the motivations yet for this particular shooting, which will require a thorough investigation. But the last three years have been so incredibly difficult for the AAPI community. And this latest shooting is yet another horrifying event that will only rekindle fears.
Mass shootings are a uniquely American problem. Gun violence at this level is a uniquely American problem. And our lack of will to act is a uniquely American problem.
A problem with our body politic, and with the Republican Party, too cowed by the National Rifle Association and its base to act.
To ban assault weapons. To establish universal background checks. To set age restrictions. To allow victims to sue negligent dealers and manufacturers. To keep guns out of the hands of felons and those who pose a danger to themselves and others.
**__To act.__**
California has some of the toughest gun safety laws on the books. But because we as a nation — and Republican Senators in particular — refuse to act, we can’t stem the tide of mass shootings and mass death. Guns cross state borders as easily as people do.
We must. We simply must. We simply must act.
On Saturday the shooting was in my backyard. Tomorrow, or the next day, it will happen somewhere else.
But until we act, more communities will join the long list of cities and towns torn apart by gun violence. Communities no longer known for their vistas or people, but for tragedies.
Let’s act.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1615%2E5257348%2E5upFv7) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1615%2E5257348%2E5upFv7)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Got Valentine’s Day plans yet?
body:
It comes at you fast
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfbca1e11-d1ef-4013-b6f5-0bad706e37b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Are you starting to think about what [you might get that special someone for Valentine's Day?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d2b2b7b-93fc-4b9d-a20e-1f11b729b46b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) As we all know, it seems like there's time and then--boom--suddenly it is upon you. **May I make a suggestion?? Your favorite person may need a ["Mazel Tough" t-shirt](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b05885a-043d-42d1-8fce-a6e1c76db3ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! ****Or, perhaps they must have a ****["No One's Treading On You, Sweetie" sticker?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2cfbce17-d937-4fc4-ae1c-a66fbe7eee5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And you can get these items, and much more, at ****Blue Amp Action's sponsor [Dissent Pins](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32b15a36-9ba5-4c6c-b91a-3786724ad45e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! ** **_[Dissent Pins is progressive, makes great, affordable products and donates half their profits to great causes, adding up to ~$1 million since they launched](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta32d3007-ca0c-42f7-953a-6c6bca40f04c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!_** [You can get great items like Ukrainian Easter Egg earrings or a "Bigfoot & Chemtrails & UFOs Oh My" Conspiracy Theory Kit! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ba74995-cf12-46f9-8eca-bacb7383de23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)They have a [fantastic Pride Collection ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5da74d01-2c86-4c75-bfd0-8c443b13cdd2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)for your new love, p[roud pro-choice pins such as "Another [Dad/Mom/Grandpa/Grandma] For Abortion Rights"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c6f6aa6-655d-437c-b2bf-a0beeb2e876f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ and stickers such as "Abortion Is Healthcare."](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22779504-6b05-4872-ab98-28a11fdfe505/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Then there's the hilarious, and yet truthful ["Send All The Billionaires To Space" patch](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a1adf92-dd1e-4263-8ea4-c5e1945bf949/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). [All of this and much more is available to purchase from this terrific, compassionate company. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2744850-9416-46aa-a993-15644aa93b40/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)As you can see below, I was already lucky enough to have my wife get me [something from Dissent Pins](https://default.salsalabs.org/T182df437-e9db-4847-b2c9-bb428e27f6e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), which I wear regularly and proudly! [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9a1e8ba-8083-4c7f-bc36-942acf5b0930/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) So, [go to Dissent Pins and get something for your loved one now for Valentine's Day--or yourself, you've earned it ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2af42611-4a31-412e-88ec-fc78c3b07071/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)by beating back the fascists this past year. It [will support our sponsor, help Blue Amp Action grow and get money to important causes](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94ede6f7-e465-4e38-9042-6cb8b65f99a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), like food and healthcare for Ukrainians or assistance for women with unwanted pregnancies, having to deal with the state trying to play doctor. Thank you for shopping & supporting Blue Amp Action[ & Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T192f0455-8418-48f4-b300-649650b50644/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5bf8920-68fe-4c11-9a81-baa0df52ad4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We're still working in several of our target states, which could significantly influence how the next decade of elections unfolds.
Anti-democratic tactics loom as a plot to seize every ounce of power as map manipulation goes unchecked. By the end of 2022, every state had a new congressional map, but legal challenges to the redrawn districts have persisted into the new year. In one example, lower federal courts in Alabama determined that the state's congressional map likely violated the Voting Rights Act by discriminating against Black voters.
In other redistricting news, states like Montana are pushing to remove politicians' power grabs, establish independent commissions, and push for redraws to progress toward a more fair redistricting system.
It's not time to go silent in the new year, team. There are times to prepare and times to seize opportunities. I cannot imagine going back and feeling like I didn't do enough to convey the significance of this moment for the next decade of elections. = Thanks, Emuni Sanderson Mobilization Strategist All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Josh Stein
subject: Let me explain:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
I am asking for a minute of your time.

| [_**I am about to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for Governor of North Carolina and Valerie Foushee for Congress. First, let me explain.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57691095/388790089/-522906310?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230123-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzJkYjliYS01YjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2sATGi8D0thiTv-95TXstxqvKzmGgP1e5z0yzam5MY=)

I learned early on that some things are worth fighting for – no matter the opposition.

Julius Chambers, James Ferguson, and my dad Adam Stein founded the first integrated law firm in North Carolina and led the legal battle against discrimination and for equality.

In 1971, their law office was firebombed and burned to the ground. But that didn’t stop them from fighting for what was right.

Today, we have a different set of bomb-throwers, who threaten our freedoms and our future.

And extremist politicians divide us to cling to power – they gerrymander legislative districts, promote the Big Lie about the 2020 election, and foment insurrectionists...

undermine and underfund public education, block Medicaid expansion, and turn a blind eye to corporate polluters...

attack fundamental reproductive freedoms, vilify entire groups of people as “filth,” and pass extreme, hateful laws, like HB2, North Carolina’s infamous bathroom bill.

**I’m running for Governor because I believe in a very different North Carolina – one rooted in our shared values of freedom, justice, and opportunity for everyone.**

For the last six years, as Attorney General of North Carolina, I’ve taken on big fights and won. I’ve worked hard to keep families safe, hold corporate wrongdoers accountable for the damage they’ve done, make polluters pay to clean up the messes they make, and defend reproductive and voting rights.

North Carolina is a great state! And if we invest in our people and their futures, we can be even greater.

Everybody deserves a fair shot – because if you work hard, where you come from should not limit how far you can go. Everyone should be able to get good health care, no matter where you live or how much money you earn. Every kid deserves a great education. And every family should be safe at home, at school or at work.

This is our moment.

Together, we can build a better and brighter North Carolina.

[_**But it’s up to us. Join us.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57691096/388790090/-522906310?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230123-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzJkYjliYS01YjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2sATGi8D0thiTv-95TXstxqvKzmGgP1e5z0yzam5MY=)

[_**And please contribute any amount you can. Thank you.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57691097/388790091/-522906310?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230123-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzJkYjliYS01YjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2sATGi8D0thiTv-95TXstxqvKzmGgP1e5z0yzam5MY=)
---
| [SPLIT A DONATION → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57691098/388790092/759413406?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230123-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzJkYjliYS01YjliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2sATGi8D0thiTv-95TXstxqvKzmGgP1e5z0yzam5MY=)
---
Let’s get it done,

Josh Stein
Attorney General of North Carolina and Democratic candidate for Governor

| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d802d619df80447cbb8d0aacfcf8c76c&_e=_IxjCJVo0Y4icY5pULx26uHEfobmqZYFV6Co2Ho34VyfLtV3vjZiDFcNjq-00drQKOCF0Xlwp4GVEQTICWPiCXuDK4ykqNmjd2au3ZWbF9hOgMgwtx_p7jdbdVBxfqLSQvesy6fS_HVr6x1OPMhz0tPLjAL6slwv5akvzw320aEOFN3sCY_VYOUgY0o6vCwIAAuHym8uUjT4iJeHmZxUmXaVR-J3xJz3pTCiTD8Oo7mJKLAxtDBuf2IYZBv3CGrDLIxFU7LiA6S2sr6ko-FjRhwvk5xgUwZZ2tWz0S9cFwwSnMUxudWZJnaVpDe0FQC8yWYy7vObAszEtErkKahQzI3WFaPdPmwcoyPoEnEOoc8DOk4zhT0vBx04eVoVzu4bUX2yRT8Dnf6Xpj6LXcMkfA%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d802d619df80447cbb8d0aacfcf8c76c&_e=_IxjCJVo0Y4icY5pULx26uHEfobmqZYFV6Co2Ho34VyfLtV3vjZiDFcNjq-00drQKOCF0Xlwp4GVEQTICWPiCXuDK4ykqNmjd2au3ZWbF9hOgMgwtx_p7jdbdVBxfqLSQvesy6fS_HVr6x1OPMhz0tPLjAL6slwv5akvzw320aEOFN3sCY_VYOUgY0o6vCwIAAuHym8uUjT4iJeHmZxUmXaVR-J3xJz3pTCiTD8Oo7mJKLAxtDBuf2IYZBv3CGrD_dC6ZQFiaPGB1W5rswD0Lv6o_rkqVL8ve513F76WpCL48K_DplUzlZEL2gCsCyjGV0Z9D5CPgUwwjWvic-8YIGeniiFWNDc8DdYxLGce6eRIg02_9tHp1k0lARNKXsU1REZORD0FC5N1gfuc5HTK7A%3D%3D) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I’m going to change that.
| Friends -

I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One, Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. Use this link to split a donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project: [https://act.protectvoting.org/go/elect-Gallego](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38769?t=6&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww) | [**CONTRIBUTE NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38769?t=7&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww)
---
Here is the truth:

The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more.

Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong.

I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.

I am going to change that.

But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort. From day one.

And that is why I am asking:

[Can you please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this race. Together.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38769?t=8&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ruben Gallego and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38770?t=9&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38771?t=10&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38772?t=11&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38773?t=12&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38769?t=13&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww)
Thank you,

Ruben Gallego
[**CONTRIBUTE NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38769?t=14&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=6094%2E878179%2EJo8Lww)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Do you know how it worked, and why it doesn’t?
body:
You’re someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what’s happening in Washington, D.C. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9434cb308c6474baeff18ca5ace1966&_e=9JiBC2vfZfkhD4nbK5P5StJA0wb4Eo-jc0wui_-U49XOicotyv-4AamtMhAxq0o1i8aiDZtic2vI0jMHVP7hzeY7hN_XLuMz93pSPBhcO_kXkGeroFchjsVqBiVh5TWNReP8p4NJAPY7G3wDTCDuii4OE9VicYGSWdAPgAXhb0xQbzr8AnGcxR8BO49-hHjTYKV9UVOVRT60ho8CWI7oOWOKxLv6y-H9ui42NbW5KANAzwEbS2vVmzsG8moZyltyUUS9iewHPncDcQ3DmI_NIJJ2suHCWw7DTxnntqXO3zRi0P3OyuzLmguzG9yzi_Ftqm6RI9MwyLZyHSmx_KByEzmNWS4BborbMlipD_oTdECL0aXdXFTEnoSr0Ec4b_bs) Dear Fellow American, You're someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what's happening in Washington, D.C. So, I have a question for you. Do you want to know how the Founders thought the United States Congress should work? Watching the news today, I'm sure you've asked yourself that. If you've ever wondered, then I encourage you to learn more with our free online course, **" Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn't." ** [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9434cb308c6474baeff18ca5ace1966&_e=9JiBC2vfZfkhD4nbK5P5StJA0wb4Eo-jc0wui_-U49XOicotyv-4AamtMhAxq0o1i8aiDZtic2vI0jMHVP7hzeY7hN_XLuMz93pSPBhcO_kXkGeroFchjsVqBiVh5TWNReP8p4NJAPY7G3wDTCDuii4OE9VicYGSWdAPgAXhb0xQbzr8AnGcxR8BO49-hHjTYKV9UVOVRT60ho8CWI7oOWOKxLv6y-H9ui42NbW5KANx0_U4YqreCKbVFtGRYEcGzll6ncMA4wIGDTIdRn8dwHpmroJjWbdKhF0uLxpavIL5xT_NfRvfCzvLYe9BpkgC4HMfDrLloyAHWhDyLJCfGUT9pNN_FX8N6wIMqsu4_Ip9210S6nNYmlpYaQBjL_iP) This popular online course is available in a special DVD box set for viewing in your home or with a small group for a limited time. **You can order your copy at this secure link:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9434cb308c6474baeff18ca5ace1966&_e=9JiBC2vfZfkhD4nbK5P5StJA0wb4Eo-jc0wui_-U49XOicotyv-4AamtMhAxq0o1i8aiDZtic2vI0jMHVP7hzeY7hN_XLuMz93pSPBhcO_kXkGeroFchjsVqBiVh5TWNReP8p4NJAPY7G3wDTCDuii4OE9VicYGSWdAPgAXhb0xQbzr8AnGcxR8BO49-hHjTYKV9UVOVRT60ho8CWI7oOWOKxLv6y-H9ui42NbW5KAO1S0vCSznWK1nZJCk_twknH85tQHTx6566e2fy-foqSKmVuXuAcWN6PuJ9QSMbbjp37iGu9subKApjv5_KZaUkOLZhGuyV46KUEgmdWpRSfkZ3pXKQFLOKkJgUw8jgiV4HBCnZZ97KgZ01iJF27s4Z) The 11-lecture course explores the Founders' understanding of the legislative power and how Congress should work, the Progressive rejection of that understanding, and how it has affected American politics. On a personal note, this was one of my favorite courses to film. I really enjoyed it, and I know you will too. You can get your DVD box set of **" Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn't"** right away with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. Your gift will support our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts that **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans nationwide. As you may know, these online courses, including **" Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn't"** and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, are only possible because of the **generous support **from donors like you. Your gift really matters because Hillsdale doesn't take a dime--NOT EVEN ONE PENNY!--from the government. Even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. So, will you help us **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans with free online courses and other educational programs by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today? Your gift will really help so that we can maintain our independence and our critical educational outreach. Here is a secure link for you to get your DVD set of **" Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn't"**:
[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9434cb308c6474baeff18ca5ace1966&_e=9JiBC2vfZfkhD4nbK5P5StJA0wb4Eo-jc0wui_-U49XOicotyv-4AamtMhAxq0o1i8aiDZtic2vI0jMHVP7hzeY7hN_XLuMz93pSPBhcO_kXkGeroFchjsVqBiVh5TWNReP8p4NJAPY7G3wDTCDuii4OE9VicYGSWdAPgAXhb0xQbzr8AnGcxR8BO49-hHjTYKV9UVOVRT60ho8CWI7oOWOKxLv6y-H9ui42NbW5KAMj1RSM9KcKMnYTFZVnqywVqqZDKcoW8MOUKs1kp5w6-DgCN_56XJL66OZ4U4CiR6C4sC5hTXwIBq_oslf8DAO3z2lpwnBMd8bfHwzIDcIyynf6rkZmO66pImuDnFS-CIezgjX2W79U7BtdnSfTh4df) In this critical time for America, know that we are deeply grateful for your friendship and support. On behalf of Hillsdale College, I hope you enjoy the course! Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College |

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 [**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=c9434cb308c6474baeff18ca5ace1966&_t=jbJfRwLkLa5AvPxkXNng1p6xSz2434fEEjxR9kuJrvyFW0NuxrR8J8bhjUSJfCZRA6s3d5OZw_KGuEPVh0y-YtPhWBJTtUIfk0mAAdCzdfgFe5tEGQIByfY1tl0SVqhihVijG_cHSy6froWcbCS35DYfU9pLwQzxsOBh_0jqjPs%3D)

name: Kari Lake
subject: Nobody’s buying their lies.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc

Our official DLCC members are the heart of our operation – we can’t secure wins for state Democrats across the country without the help from our consistent, dedicated supporters. You are what makes all of this work possible.
We’re asking you to activate your membership today because state Democrats are facing FIVE important special elections over the next two months in battleground states New Hampshire and Pennsylvania – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November!
**President Biden and President Obama know that electing Democratic leaders in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in states like yours. ****That’s why we rely on grassroots supporters like you, to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents.**
As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, expand Democratic power at the state level, and help ensure we elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. But that only happens when folks like you step up and chip in what they can. So we’re asking:

subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a7616336ee64cda9e3fbe527db24f5b&_e=jsvG3KxewEWu1VyeWz0R8DQMTB6fZ5cGAZn3piOpI5HsSbUQ5w3n8Hw8t-sBOV-BNMN_pqYh_iVFApsQksrr0KZ8ErFfLGmR2A3wU8qrL_XmsVTCevJPSHZDMd6Aq2_239c2x4OCHdGLiyEdS2YlqGkws8do63NxiI8ZTJ35CG72ic2ZesfbnnBqBX6-HVxHbTUm_rgydIbxRjIPTLRjjNuLkwB7NdY4E0MCaHP-fifW-P6G38834nMLoA8fAFXGNaotgE5cilRTJvncogezd4D2tgcc1dSQL9Px2EJIPiiG7sAZWmLYZ1-k8x1V19fMeLUNCP265wRq3r7fF-mvQWfRCL_ZY_xKFmfyZqXaEBpy5tJ-OZWExudoz9OBSHUROhwofgALaMDrBzU-BEP2KA%3D%3D)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a7616336ee64cda9e3fbe527db24f5b&_e=jsvG3KxewEWu1VyeWz0R8DQMTB6fZ5cGAZn3piOpI5HsSbUQ5w3n8Hw8t-sBOV-BNMN_pqYh_iVFApsQksrr0KZ8ErFfLGmR2A3wU8qrL_XmsVTCevJPSHZDMd6Aq2_239c2x4OCHdGLiyEdS2YlqGkws8do63NxiI8ZTJ35CG72ic2ZesfbnnBqBX6-HVxHbTUm_rgydIbxRjIPTLRjjNuLkwB7NdY4E0MCaHP-fifW-P6G38834nMLoA8fAFXGzAB_j16JJjxRRvK8Q-sEo_609z4a3mg9SqAMAuVgzYEXslUnOvFtVCRWGg21aAQd1ljHIYxurUS0C1KFLwFUGS9E78yCsfR8CD5PKLXueVWnhDDo9kZLwhe19MD8GdUf_ihFVJtR0-9HH7jIEY5Wlw%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family –– including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a7616336ee64cda9e3fbe527db24f5b&_e=jsvG3KxewEWu1VyeWz0R8DQMTB6fZ5cGAZn3piOpI5HsSbUQ5w3n8Hw8t-sBOV-BNMN_pqYh_iVFApsQksrr0KZ8ErFfLGmR2A3wU8qrL_XmsVTCevJPSHZDMd6Aq2_239c2x4OCHdGLiyEdS2YlqGkws8do63NxiI8ZTJ35CG72ic2ZesfbnnBqBX6-HVxHbTUm_rgydIbxRjIPTLRjjNuLkwB7NdY4E0MCaHP-fifW-P6G38834nMLoA8fAFXGVvaakYzXNrbccuguJfYnu-JZ0x4UyrF3CadjfQSEpVT60RXwePLkEuljurkLEak04IMV7VHHaMjPmD_xfWY2aAF-64qryhU2mNKhC-lmDMztNCh3c9QfKy_6DKFS0m0ua8W00bLLGKrM4O5MbWkv2w%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today – but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a7616336ee64cda9e3fbe527db24f5b&_e=jsvG3KxewEWu1VyeWz0R8DQMTB6fZ5cGAZn3piOpI5HsSbUQ5w3n8Hw8t-sBOV-BNMN_pqYh_iVFApsQksrr0KZ8ErFfLGmR2A3wU8qrL_XmsVTCevJPSHZDMd6Aq2_239c2x4OCHdGLiyEdS2YlqGkws8do63NxiI8ZTJ35CG72ic2ZesfbnnBqBX6-HVxHbTUm_rgydIbxRjIPTLRjjNuLkwB7NdY4E0MCaHP-fifW-P6G38834nMLoA8fAFXGExvmJNn3VauWmdYcfCA3cpx-R11vrHyMSQ4Xe63Hjsp5K7ZdiAX55H6r8eyWpjV_SGo0dviy1s6v9eSFXbZrlk3TjQ_WTox-DUQzpuiHdvdY6I1u2wJSxTmR5LAXLpjlGU1ftGlZFf1ULhuQ-CS3bw%3D%3D) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a7616336ee64cda9e3fbe527db24f5b&_e=jsvG3KxewEWu1VyeWz0R8DQMTB6fZ5cGAZn3piOpI5HsSbUQ5w3n8Hw8t-sBOV-BNMN_pqYh_iVFApsQksrr0KZ8ErFfLGmR2A3wU8qrL_XmsVTCevJPSHZDMd6Aq2_239c2x4OCHdGLiyEdS2YlqGkws8do63NxiI8ZTJ35CG72ic2ZesfbnnBqBX6-HVxHbTUm_rgydIbxRjIPTLRjjNuLkwB7NdY4E0MCaHP-fifW-P6G38834nMLoA8fAFXGukFxhIUSf8WibRIN6gHs11f2Uz8xmacax1SUjB6tZBG-ffVd6u5OVlheQqg8Kf0PbNub6s-E-XwwwhaHbam8ofozuILOxy1sBf7U-uixz5NbzJtmBLtQsA3hyJaz2Kq0rD9p9RWTmosDaWn0SqXdHQ%3D%3D)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a7616336ee64cda9e3fbe527db24f5b&_e=jsvG3KxewEWu1VyeWz0R8DQMTB6fZ5cGAZn3piOpI5HsSbUQ5w3n8Hw8t-sBOV-BNMN_pqYh_iVFApsQksrr0KZ8ErFfLGmR2A3wU8qrL_XmsVTCevJPSHZDMd6Aq2_239c2x4OCHdGLiyEdS2YlqGkws8do63NxiI8ZTJ35CG72ic2ZesfbnnBqBX6-HVxHbTUm_rgydIbxRjIPTLRjjNuLkwB7NdY4E0MCaHP-fifW-P6G38834nMLoA8fAFXGJJiz0n2KyKV8T1OovTopRxiJD539URLujbuaeTovkJt-U2uu1aEZ_ClELvxDtTSRysvJ305FvsPHUhQX1VDKwBMgnHUZNKR--3chycVrNxt0cXko-gVhy0nymWYLytPnyUYig-A2_-pPsVFFkMRirQ%3D%3D) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country –– and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a7616336ee64cda9e3fbe527db24f5b&_e=jsvG3KxewEWu1VyeWz0R8DQMTB6fZ5cGAZn3piOpI5HsSbUQ5w3n8Hw8t-sBOV-BNMN_pqYh_iVFApsQksrr0KZ8ErFfLGmR2A3wU8qrL_XmsVTCevJPSHZDMd6Aq2_239c2x4OCHdGLiyEdS2YlqGkws8do63NxiI8ZTJ35CG72ic2ZesfbnnBqBX6-HVxHbTUm_rgydIbxRjIPTLRjjNuLkwB7NdY4E0MCaHP-fifW-P6G38834nMLoA8fAFXGXGcoY6-UN8CE0Ed_v7kfFEusPxn-G5rWWyl8QwHSwOEoUPiQ91zzJg87f2JCSAFdcYxVKmbWzQk7IkTC7b-8QtDXroD5YWkfbKW0bs2L24YOwsRqL7_E1u8PRXgSQ1iWWTFjWZNOs5ak6eh75Y_sgw%3D%3D)

And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country –– and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Grateful for Another Term
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Peter,

This past Saturday, I was unanimously re-elected as Chair of the Tennessee Democratic Party by our State Executive Committee — it's an honor.

I am elated at the opportunity to continue building our party anew, and to continue doing the crucial work of empowering and motivating Democrats to win again in Tennessee. We have made significant gains in building the type of infrastructure that can deliver victory. Now is time for that victory.

Myself and our newly elected leadership are ready to hit the ground running to build for a successful election year in 2024, but we need continued support to get us there. Can you chip in $10 now to help us strengthen our infrastructure [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty] ?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
$25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

We are looking forward to an even more successful 2023-2024 election cycle and are ever grateful for our former and current officers — we couldn't do this without their commitment.

Building back Democratic infrastructure takes time, which is why we are in this for the long haul. Each and every one of you has played a crucial role in our success so far, and we're not stopping now.

We are keeping the faith. Are you with us? Help me start my new term off strong by chipping in $10 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty] → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Ready to work,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party.Carol V. Abney, Treasurer.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Contributions or gifts to Tennessee Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Our Revolution
subject: Ruben Gallego enters the race against Sinema!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

BREAKING NEWS: Progressive Congressman Ruben
Gallego just got in the race against Kyrsten Sinema, and Our Revolution is
all-in!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8254?t=1011&akid=3914%2E5885482%2E40iM3H ]We need to show as much momentum as possible on his launch day to tell
Sinema and her corporate donors that dropping out is her best option. Can
we count on you to chip in as a founding donor?

Sinema has repeatedly betrayed women, our democracy, workers, and more at
the behest of her billionaire donors — joining Joe Manchin to block
filibuster reform and single-handedly saving a specific tax break for
billionaire hedge fund managers.

We're sick of her selling out the American people so corporations can use
the filibuster to block new regulations and deepen wealth inequality.

Despite the overwhelming desire of voters across the spectrum for
affordable drug prices, Sinema personally made sure that nothing that hurt
big drug companies passed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8254?t=1012&akid=3914%2E5885482%2E40iM3H ]Now, with a great progressive Congressman running against her, we
finally have a chance to make her pay for betraying her voters. Help
defeat Sinema by pitching in here!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8173?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230123_1_1&t=1013&akid=3914%2E5885482%2E40iM3H ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8174?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230123_1_1&t=1014&akid=3914%2E5885482%2E40iM3H ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8175?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230123_1_1&t=1015&akid=3914%2E5885482%2E40iM3H ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8176?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230123_1_1&t=1016&akid=3914%2E5885482%2E40iM3H ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8177?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230123_1_1&t=1017&akid=3914%2E5885482%2E40iM3H ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8172?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230123_1_1&t=1018&akid=3914%2E5885482%2E40iM3H ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

Our Revolution has laid the groundwork in Arizona for Gallego's run for
years, holding rallies outside Sinema's office and confronting her at the
airport after she flew back from a weekend spa retreat with wealthy
donors.

If we stand together and organize, we will win this race.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Do you support Greg Abbott? Weigh in now:
disclaimer_text: paid for by The Real Texas PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_upsl?refcode=051622&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_upsl?refcode=051622&amount=25]
Have you taken a moment to share your thoughts on Greg Abbott? Please weigh in below >>>
Tomorrow marks one week since Greg Abbott was inaugurated for a third time.
During his inauguration speech, he made empty promises and spouted extremist talking points.
He promised to fix the grid... he's been promising that for YEARS.
He emphasized the importance of "school choice"... which is code for funneling tax payer money to private schools.
He even had the AUDACITY to say he would prioritize school safety... by "focusing on mental health."
He made absolutely no mention of guns.
So, we want to know: Now that he's been officially inaugurated as Governor for a third term, do you support Greg Abbott?
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_upsl?refcode=011722_1&amount=10] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_upsl?refcode=011722_1&amount=10]

clean_body: [] Have you taken a moment to share your thoughts on Greg Abbott? Please weigh in below >>> Tomorrow marks one week since Greg Abbott was inaugurated for a third time. During his inauguration speech, he made empty promises and spouted extremist talking points. He promised to fix the grid... he's been promising that for YEARS. He emphasized the importance of "school choice"... which is code for funneling tax payer money to private schools. He even had the AUDACITY to say he would prioritize school safety... by "focusing on mental health." He made absolutely no mention of guns. So, we want to know: Now that he's been officially inaugurated as Governor for a third term, do you support Greg Abbott? YES [] NO [] Political advertising paid for by The Real Texas PAC. name: Jorge Galicia
subject: How I went from a normal teenager to a freedom fighter
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a19f1ad272434c3ab2978c1e01c7d975&_e=owiGf4H01rbtcyGgQ58fmZl-nZo8UqY1YcmWYM75KMgON0Y0xsKjEEaVGSFXfK6B_lFvuflyvrhWIIX-ao4Rb97B4LiqicKNMtzNMdTFMjuTJ_yDUvrowW4kqJz07RFhjYpbeYGgj5B67794SSxCLKsF_r85QqDs5EAq4MHctCznSjpyfAvQJHpRclse_EovPQ8ywcROqTJp75V1w0lAYdhtw17HkqbDdeIpCMRsa1mAn2M6m50oplrAaw-5a00sYVV7RWqcwf1bDsOGuDBxEA%3D%3D)
Friend,

Venezuela used to be a democratic and free country. Before socialism devastated my country, I lived a life similar to most middle-class Americans. My childhood was pretty good.

**But around the time I became a teenager, the country elected Socialists into power. **

I started to notice the signs almost immediately. I could see the scarcity of food and goods around the country. Our quality of life declined rapidly.

A friend and I joined with others to fight back, but so did the State.

**Maduro’s political police captured my friend, forcing me to flee the country.**

Now, I'm one of 6 million Venezuelans who have fled since its economic, social, and political collapse. And I want to share my story with the world.

**The Dissent Project sends survivors of socialism, like me, to high schools and teaches students about this dangerous ideology.**

[_**To help us send speakers to more high schools, we set a goal to reach 100 new donors this month. Can you send a gift of $50, $35, or even $10 today >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a19f1ad272434c3ab2978c1e01c7d975&_e=owiGf4H01rbtcyGgQ58fmZl-nZo8UqY1YcmWYM75KMgON0Y0xsKjEEaVGSFXfK6B_lFvuflyvrhWIIX-ao4Rb97B4LiqicKNMtzNMdTFMjuWLih27bBFKLMxCC9uqtwD148j_pc-RSehtC1IcXY2pmt6y_U55PtIqWWjuKc5mfuiaJp3W2WzgZ6qVyZNjo9s-17s0-usGJg-T1kfo9FsD-kYl7__2YT4e8KCWUeDcXdWHmzmFBLZiyfSFnHybYCDo73zB6Xvq9xyI7YKDgDavw%3D%3D)

I want to share my eyewitness perspective of how a country with so much wealth and promise completely collapsed.

Living under socialist tyranny has shown me firsthand the dangers of letting the State grow and take over every aspect of your life.

From a very young age, I have been speaking out about the very real damages caused by socialism.

**Now it's my life’s mission to win the fight! **

And one of the best ways to win the fight against socialism in America is to warn the next generation.

Please help me share my experience with high school students by supporting the Dissident Project.

[_**Friend, can you send a generous gift today? Even a donation of $10, $35, or even $50 makes a big difference. Click here to support the Dissident Project >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a19f1ad272434c3ab2978c1e01c7d975&_e=owiGf4H01rbtcyGgQ58fmZl-nZo8UqY1YcmWYM75KMgON0Y0xsKjEEaVGSFXfK6B_lFvuflyvrhWIIX-ao4Rb97B4LiqicKNMtzNMdTFMjuGwf1dST_rUeQFq4ODj0vW133MmZqUg_6gDGblQR20mYzus6-Ys9FzfVgCdlP7ybYthh-VqBdOQnpPYKRCq__GofsrB0FYJ0Uk6N1oyNCWBHcWFWXB2yThAiD_mxG32v8xYDLxAhGK-FYEqxOiqUKUoubf5qHgcWxUq1gSvITiaA%3D%3D)

**We’ve already reached 3,000 students with the first talks for our Dissident Project. **

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a19f1ad272434c3ab2978c1e01c7d975&_e=owiGf4H01rbtcyGgQ58fmZl-nZo8UqY1YcmWYM75KMgON0Y0xsKjEEaVGSFXfK6B_lFvuflyvrhWIIX-ao4Rb97B4LiqicKNMtzNMdTFMjspdxWxlb1qsWcGuQ1TCSZp6_CJTYAN2iLz3KJf_YChR5HuYB22Q7cocl6o0b5A87znLPPIJov1OI5NHfqfxlo7uTuJBMvpxJOF_EnorlUGGtebtQzB-Wzk-CmF153uQdqYoovl97GDPl0Lxhw10H5ODBuRfInNh0OMbPMXfeCngQ%3D%3D)

I recently shared my story of standing up to Venezuela's socialist regime with Cinco Ranch High School. I reminded them that we can’t take our freedom and our economy for granted. If we follow the wrong ideas, America could follow Venezuela’s example.

Socialism isn’t a thing of the past — people are dealing with the consequences every day!

Socialism destroyed my life. And I’m convinced that if students hear my story, they will understand the truth behind the socialist doctrine.

**Please _click belo_ w to help me share my experience with more high school students.**

clean_body: Friend, Venezuela used to be a democratic and free country. Before socialism devastated my country, I lived a life similar to most middle-class Americans. My childhood was pretty good. But around the time I became a teenager, the country elected Socialists into power. I started to notice the signs almost immediately. I could see the scarcity of food and goods around the country. Our quality of life declined rapidly. A friend and I joined with others to fight back, but so did the State. Maduro’s political police captured my friend, forcing me to flee the country. Now, I'm one of 6 million Venezuelans who have fled since its economic, social, and political collapse. And I want to share my story with the world. The Dissent Project sends survivors of socialism, like me, to high schools and teaches students about this dangerous ideology. I want to share my eyewitness perspective of how a country with so much wealth and promise completely collapsed. Living under socialist tyranny has shown me firsthand the dangers of letting the State grow and take over every aspect of your life. From a very young age, I have been speaking out about the very real damages caused by socialism. Now it's my life’s mission to win the fight! And one of the best ways to win the fight against socialism in America is to warn the next generation. Please help me share my experience with high school students by supporting the Dissident Project. We’ve already reached 3,000 students with the first talks for our Dissident Project. I recently shared my story of standing up to Venezuela's socialist regime with Cinco Ranch High School. I reminded them that we can’t take our freedom and our economy for granted. If we follow the wrong ideas, America could follow Venezuela’s example. Socialism isn’t a thing of the past — people are dealing with the consequences every day! Socialism destroyed my life. And I’m convinced that if students hear my story, they will understand the truth behind the socialist doctrine. Please click belo w to help me share my experience with more high school students. Thank you, Jorge Galicia The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Higher Education Opinion Survey
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3ee16b2c0854f7eb747694b11a116a4&_e=8lcgQh51XTZg-nj2NI7CGFDSQTmZVQKsP_I6WiRDe-tFqjOdvlx28v3Yb5wJ9wfgSbpTkC72m0UAx5FcP2DN8jAZDsMxl3R2AW1WdtPcCb2WVI-yB7OtBXizEi4AMcHTF7VcB5ZkEou_wGq0Ecer3CpV-yd_TTDHL72e_dgDuT-11XVbzEulmmyFjV2kNPK6xe_ekp3I9zl9efP_DP1Dv_DOmNaXn-knSxww4vqrHR3TP7Z9BU0iiF5x8iKcix2Jm5Y_rng0A3s5AWyEPWa7wxrBiUqWGD_3RXx17ZTjvL0IZa2mr04feqmnKszHEe-Qzak8DON8bnLHvLRGa_36U7F6jy-5R3dBo_3ELGnrAyojMUugDB7d6UptKMOnrUUN)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3ee16b2c0854f7eb747694b11a116a4&_e=8lcgQh51XTZg-nj2NI7CGFDSQTmZVQKsP_I6WiRDe-tFqjOdvlx28v3Yb5wJ9wfgSbpTkC72m0UAx5FcP2DN8jAZDsMxl3R2AW1WdtPcCb2WVI-yB7OtBXizEi4AMcHTF7VcB5ZkEou_wGq0Ecer3CpV-yd_TTDHL72e_dgDuT-11XVbzEulmmyFjV2kNPK6xe_ekp3I9zl9efP_DP1Dv_DOmNaXn-knSxww4vqrHR0ouopjnoAbI9_unTOzlhYmuaELspne7GVs1-QxrqUUB3YGs6U5eQ8QOzwWHkCd10i8HbjJD8vIi9Jna7_-_M0oaXwE4ur0_da9gokm29Y4W2QURXNsJNgi9HwjcTZUx5YuNhvbCh4loJ6Ket_BXQLl) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3ee16b2c0854f7eb747694b11a116a4&_e=8lcgQh51XTZg-nj2NI7CGFDSQTmZVQKsP_I6WiRDe-tFqjOdvlx28v3Yb5wJ9wfgSbpTkC72m0UAx5FcP2DN8jAZDsMxl3R2AW1WdtPcCb2WVI-yB7OtBXizEi4AMcHTF7VcB5ZkEou_wGq0Ecer3CpV-yd_TTDHL72e_dgDuT-11XVbzEulmmyFjV2kNPK6xe_ekp3I9zl9efP_DP1Dv_DOmNaXn-knSxww4vqrHR1eeM9boSAwKmPp56geUG4EyHW8GdP63r1qcqYzrh4aF4eHAgIuy8zIRDbU6n52P6XIjeb8-e9afmfDY0w7HxZ8bsEOoCIipxD361RBxP-FOLMbv5gMKkTG3W6X6HgHjFMF2tz6FewTaK4Jf8BG28Dk) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter, Republican Congressman Jim Banks is the latest Indiana GOP member to seek higher office. Despite a failed record representing his district, he’s now running for the U.S. Senate In Congress, Jim Banks has led with arrogance and extremism and ignored the interests of Northeast Indiana. His votes against economic investments, job creation, and a historic infrastructure law show that he cares less about the future of our families and workers and more about climbing the political ladder. [**We can defeat Banks and other Republican extremists by building a coalition of voters and donors that believe in electing people who actually want to help Hoosiers. | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=306ea99b9c8f4ba5a7ec2ca2d065d210&_e=YcJxLA5Z2cg_2Kvlzh2vJkbh3sM7V2T-Ja3dfN7qXMGB4eEX2FWea5QiydkJu2NfCNKGcObKnB09wccgaXgokcMX-sQTEWpHD0kbtW5oOpuQYxqg3GSXqIChSqsjZ9ERXYF61gseNrBEvkWZR_L2LCTFx9q_TGtONRc7oN-zEAdo9qqbKu6LQ_-rIxkoBRRae5BQuFLb8o1lVthCl0GIKe_-XUlcwISq24qZjEQH_M_bXRgpuBrPucSKvxx3N7bbKTT1HtQsdDBeEjpKmCzPfA1wWv-2oA_u3YUZo65PQeMyhjTB4noaKr_9i8NBpqO7wHL1-ujLjKbwa1BumWLa4S99QxyhrFknjL1jxwAb0DxGyVWYs46MMqxZK6BBosn_Lp89L8H9NWWhgNK19SAPmQ%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=306ea99b9c8f4ba5a7ec2ca2d065d210&_e=YcJxLA5Z2cg_2Kvlzh2vJkbh3sM7V2T-Ja3dfN7qXMGB4eEX2FWea5QiydkJu2NfCNKGcObKnB09wccgaXgokcMX-sQTEWpHD0kbtW5oOpuQYxqg3GSXqIChSqsjZ9ERXYF61gseNrBEvkWZR_L2LCTFx9q_TGtONRc7oN-zEAdo9qqbKu6LQ_-rIxkoBRRae5BQuFLb8o1lVthCl0GIKe_-XUlcwISq24qZjEQH_M_bXRgpuBrPucSKvxx3N7bbNPYwLyuv5Uh_1WX5XMIfu8Kao7hIzg0ZUlSSzpQk5XIud5oYUnyHLYLqjm7X6RmzlfjeyIoM30rmJN5O9G1QM8NsLdKiEG0xmD07Bk23tgJPYKvO-S9N7aR_gktrwW79OGztGsr-3qfzr5mOJaCdhA%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging
Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One,
Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not
nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. Use this
link to split a donation between my campaign and Charles Booker:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18870?t=1001&akid=2919%2E346206%2EbHnfaf ]secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-rg

CHIP IN →

Here is the truth:

The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s
the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those
who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum
wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs,
and more.

Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States
Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting
and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong.

I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.

I am going to change that.

But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the
Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort.
From day one.

And that is why I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18870?t=1002&akid=2919%2E346206%2EbHnfaf ]Can you please split a $20 contribution between my campaign and Charles
Booker to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It
all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this
race. Together.

Thank you,

Ruben Gallego

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230123-2919-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2919_346206_bHnfaf&akid=2919%2E346206%2EbHnfaf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2919%2E346206%2EbHnfaf

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: We have a problem.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we have a
problem.

The Moderate PAC — yes, that’s their real name — is planning on raising
$20 million to spend against us, our movement, and our candidates. They
got $1,000,000 from a billionaire and GOP mega-donor.

Why is a GOP-mega donor supporting moderate Democrats? Because he’s
terrified of our people-powered movement that is challenging the entire
political status quo and would rather have weak, corporate Democrats in
Congress than progressive champions.

Peter, we don’t
have billionaire backers, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, and we
need your support today to fight back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230123-27197&t=1001&akid=27197%2E1203867%2EYja6IS ]The Moderate PAC is going to do everything they can to slow down our
progress. Please contribute $3 right now to make a
difference as we recruit the next generation of progressive leaders.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230123-27197&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27197%2E1203867%2EYja6IS ]Contribute $3

The corporate-backed establishment will stop at nothing to prevent more
nurses, bartenders, principals, community organizers and regular people
from entering the Democratic Party in Congress.

They would rather buy elections than let working-class progressives even
run. They will do everything in their power to make themselves richer at
the expense of robbing poor and working-class Americans.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230123-27197&t=1021&akid=27197%2E1203867%2EYja6IS ]Our organization is funded by thousands of people donating what they
can because they believe in taking on the corrupt status quo. Will you
step up today with a contribution?

Whether you can afford to contribute today or not, I’m so thankful that
you’re a part of this movement.

Thank you,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27197%2E1203867%2EYja6IS ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27197%2E1203867%2EYja6IS ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230123-27197-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27197_1203867_Yja6IS&akid=27197%2E1203867%2EYja6IS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27197%2E1203867%2EYja6IS

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Thank you, Alexandra Rojas Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

Hey Peter -Here’s the thing... I won my last race by a **razor-thin margin**. Just _**546 votes!**_

My same liberal Democrat opponent, Aspen Adam Frisch, **already** filed to run against me.

As you can imagine, left-wingers are going to rally around him **big time** after they came so close this past election.

[**We need your help now to fight back.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=bcb8c1ff75&e=fdefed58de)

I joined 19 fellow conservatives in Congress this month to help lead the Speaker fight – and we **fundamentally changed the direction of our country.**

We took a stand and **didn’t back down.**

And you know what, just like clockwork, now I have a BIG target on my back from the radical left.

If we had come up only a few hundred votes short, **my district would have given another vote to liberal Democrat Hakeem Jeffries for Speaker.**

**So please**[**chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $250, right away to help us defend this Toss-Up seat from FAR LEFT radicals.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9abbd8f3e0&e=fdefed58de)

Peter, yesterday marked the **_50th anniversary_** of the _Roe v. Wade_ decision, yet the fight to protect reproductive freedom is far from finished.

When Donald Trump’s handpicked Supreme Court justices overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , reproductive freedom was immediately banned or severely limited in 11 states. **That number has since increased to 13 states.**

If that wasn’t bad enough: **House Republicans recently passed an extreme anti-choice bill that could restrict abortion access at the federal level.**

And on top of everything: **the GOP is threatening to not only ban it across several more states, but they are also working to criminalize abortion pills.**

We can’t afford to give up an ounce of hope, Peter! Unite the Country is fighting tooth and nail to uplift the Biden Administration’s pro-choice agenda and ensure that we elect more pro-choice Democrats to codify _Roe_ and save the future of reproductive freedom.

[**But we need to know you’re with us in this fight. So before midnight, tell us: are you all in to protect reproductive rights?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57695326/388806758/-1684465156?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyZmMzNjM1LTcxOWItZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZH2SPkxc9o6Hpor3GOlDxsQQKVwKgovFuDFr57YOaBE=&emci=812a645e-609b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=62fc3635-719b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=16951753)
| [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57695327/388806759/-1684465156?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyZmMzNjM1LTcxOWItZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZH2SPkxc9o6Hpor3GOlDxsQQKVwKgovFuDFr57YOaBE=&emci=812a645e-609b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=62fc3635-719b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=16951753) | [NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57695328/388806760/-1684465156?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyZmMzNjM1LTcxOWItZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZH2SPkxc9o6Hpor3GOlDxsQQKVwKgovFuDFr57YOaBE=&emci=812a645e-609b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=62fc3635-719b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=16951753)

President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
Here is the truth:
#

Peter -
We’ve sent a few fundraising emails today, and this is another one. Please give us a chance to explain why these messages — especially today — are so important.
Here is the truth:
Political campaigns cost a lot of money. Too much, honestly. You know that.
There are two ways you can raise that money. You can go the route Senator Sinema has gone and ask the wealthy and powerful to write huge checks.
Or you can go the route Ruben is going, and that's raising most of his money by inspiring lots and lots of people from all backgrounds to make small donations of whatever amount they can afford, whenever they can afford it.
What you may not know is that almost all of those donations come in response to emails like this one. So we hope you’ll see these messages as a small price to pay for replacing Senator Sinema with Ruben Gallego.
But if that is going to happen, we need the resources to start strong. Because the attacks are already happening. And that is why we have to ask:
